meaning: a. 机械的, 机械性的, 力学的\n[医] 机械的, 力学的
example: A mechanical process.
exampleCn: 一个机械过程。

meaning: n. 温暖, 温情, 暖和, 激动, 生气
example: An agreeable warmth in the house.
exampleCn: 屋子里洋溢着令人愉快的温暖。

meaning: a. 不确定的, 无常的, 不确信的, 不可预测的\n[法] 不确定的, 未定的, 不确信的
example: Uncertain of his convictions.
exampleCn: 不确定他的信念。

meaning: n. 忠贞, 忠诚, 忠实\n[法] 忠诚, 忠心
example: They felt no loyalty to a losing team.
exampleCn: 他们对失败的球队没有忠诚感。

meaning: n. 拒绝, 推却, 优先决定权\n[法] 拒绝, 谢绝, 取舍权
example: His refusal to apologise made the situation far worse and the argument dragged on for another two painful.
exampleCn: 他拒绝道歉使情况变得更糟争论又拖延了痛苦的两个小时。

meaning: n. 陆军上校, 长官
example: The colonel stood before his troops and delivered a stirring speech the night before the final decisive battle.
exampleCn: 上校在最后一役前夕站在他的部队前发表了激动人心的演讲。

meaning: n. 洪水, 大量之水, 涨潮\nvt. 淹没, 使泛滥, 注满\nvi. 被淹, 溢出, 涌进
example: A flood of requests.
exampleCn: 大量的请求。

meaning: n. 数学\n[机] 数学
example: She has loved mathematics since she was a young girl and now teaches it at the university.
exampleCn: 她从小女孩时就热爱数学现在在她曾经学习过的大学教数学。

meaning: a. 不快乐的, 不幸的, 不适当的
example: Unhappy over her departure.
exampleCn: 对她的离开感到不高兴。

meaning: a. 不公平的, 不正直的, 不正当的\n[法] 不正直的, 不公平的, 偏颇的
example: Used unfair methods.
exampleCn: 使用了不公平的手段。

meaning: a. 不必要的
example: The report was full of unnecessary details that made it hard to find the most important points.
exampleCn: 这份报告充满了不必要的细节使得在文件中找到最重要的要点变得困难。

meaning: a. 不舒服的, 不自在的, 不安的
example: This kind of life can prove disruptive and uncomfortable.
exampleCn: 这种生活可能会充满破坏性和不舒服。

meaning: n. 优点, 功绩, 价值, 功过, 真相\nvt. 值得\nvi. 应受
example: Work of great merit.
exampleCn: 工作有大功德。

meaning: a. 平静的, 和平的, 和平时期的, 爱好和平的, 喜爱安静的\n[法] 和平的, 爱好和平的, 和平时期的
example: A peaceful nation.
exampleCn: 一个和平的国家。

meaning: adv. 悲痛地, 悲惨地, 悲伤地, 说来遗憾
example: Sadly he died before he could see his grandchild.
exampleCn: 遗憾的是，他还没来得及见到孙子就去世了。

meaning: n. 羞耻, 羞愧, 耻辱\nvt. 使羞愧, 侮辱
example: One mistake brought shame to all his family.
exampleCn: 一个错误，让全家人蒙羞。

meaning: n. 推进, 吹捧\nvt. 推进, 提高, 宣扬, 促进
example: He gave her a boost over the fence.
exampleCn: 他把她推过栅栏。

meaning: n. 食橱, 碗柜, 餐具柜
example: She opened the cupboard under the stairs and pulled out an old photo album she had not seen.
exampleCn: 她打开楼梯下的橱柜拿出一本多年未见的老相册。

meaning: n. 汗, 汗水, 水珠, 焦急\nvi. 出汗, 渗出, 冒出水气, 结水珠, 烦恼, 懊恼\nvt. 使出汗, 流出, 榨出, 使汗流浃背
example: Sweat poured off his brow.
exampleCn: 汗水从他的额头上流下来。

meaning: n. 持续时间, 持续\n[计] 持续时间
example: The ceremony was of short duration.
exampleCn: 仪式持续时间较短。

meaning: a. 喝醉了的\ndrink的过去式
example: Drunk with excitement.
exampleCn: 激动得醉了。

meaning: n. 维生素\n[化] 维生素
example: Oranges and lemons are rich in vitamin C which helps the body fight off colds and other common.
exampleCn: 橙子和柠檬富含维生素C有助于身体抵抗感冒和其他常见感染。

meaning: a. 不停的, 无穷尽的, 无尽的\n[机] 无端的, 环状的
example: Endless debates.
exampleCn: 无休止的辩论。

meaning: n. 分类, 分级\n[化] 分级; 分粒; 分类
example: The library uses a simple classification system to help readers find the books they need quickly and easily.
exampleCn: 图书馆使用简单的分类系统帮助读者快速轻松地找到他们需要的书。

meaning: vt. 减轻, 救济, 解除, 使免除, 换...的班, 使得到调剂, 使不单调, 衬托, 使显著\nvi. 救济, 当替补投手, 呈鲜明突出
example: This pill will relieve your headaches.
exampleCn: 这药丸可以缓解你的头痛。

meaning: n. 遗憾, 后悔, 悔恨, 抱歉, 歉意\nvt. 为...感到遗憾, 后悔, 惋惜, 懊悔, 抱歉\nvi. 感到抱歉
example: He wrote a note expressing his regret.
exampleCn: 他写了一张纸条表达他的遗憾。

meaning: num. 十七, 十七个
example: She left home at seventeen to join a dance company in the capital and never looked back once.
exampleCn: 她十七岁离开家加入首都的一个舞团这辈子再也没有回头看过。

meaning: n. 光荣, 荣耀, 荣誉, 壮丽, 繁荣\nvi. 自豪
example: He valued glory above life itself.
exampleCn: 他看重荣耀胜过生命本身。

meaning: a. 钝的, 无趣的, 呆滞的, 阴暗的\nvt. 使迟钝, 使阴暗, 缓和\nvi. 变迟钝, 减少
example: He was so dull at parties.
exampleCn: 他在聚会上表现得很迟钝。

meaning: n. 惊吓, 恐慌\nvt. 惊吓, 使恐慌\nvi. 受惊
example: A war scare.
exampleCn: 战争恐慌。

meaning: n. 骑手, (文件后的)附件, 扶手\n[化] 游码
example: The rider guided her horse carefully over the fence and galloped toward the finish line with the wind.
exampleCn: 骑手小心地引导她的马越过栅栏迎着风朝终点线飞奔而去。

meaning: a. 孤单的, 孤寂的, 荒凉的
example: A lonely fisherman stood on a tuft of gravel.
exampleCn: 一个孤独的渔夫站在一簇砾石上。

meaning: n. 初步做法, 初步措施, 预试, 预选赛\na. 初步的, 开始的, 预备的
example: Training is a necessary preliminary to employment.
exampleCn: 培训是就业的必要前提。

meaning: n. 旅馆, 客栈\nvi. 住旅馆
example: They stopped at a cosy old inn by the roadside and spent the night in a room.
exampleCn: 他们在路边一家舒适的老客栈停下来在一间有噼啪作响的壁火的房间里过了一夜。

meaning: vt. 处罚, 惩罚, 严厉对待\nvi. 惩罚
example: We had to punish the dog for soiling the floor again.
exampleCn: 我们不得不惩罚那只狗，因为它又弄脏了地板。

meaning: a. 有影响的, 有势力的
example: An influential newspaper.
exampleCn: 有影响力的报纸。

meaning: n. 追踪, 追求, 追赶, 娱乐, 职业\n[法] 追捕, 追求
example: The culprit started to run and the cop took off in pursuit.
exampleCn: 歹徒开始逃跑，警察开始追赶。

meaning: n. 释放, 解放\n[化] 发出; 释放; 放出
example: She worked for women's liberation.
exampleCn: 她致力于妇女解放。

meaning:
n. 轻拍
v. 轻拍
adv. 适时, 正好, 恰好, 毫不迟疑, 熟记地
a. 恰好的, 合适的, 熟练的, 坚定的, 人为的
example: Pat him on the shoulder.
exampleCn: 拍拍他的肩膀。

meaning: n. 托盘, 公文盘, 满盘, 发射箱\n[化] 淋盘
example: She carried a tray of steaming mugs of tea into the garden and handed them.
exampleCn: 她端着一托盘热气腾腾的茶杯走进花园分发给疲惫的朋友们。

meaning: adv. 安全地, 确实地
example: We are safely out of there.
exampleCn: 我们已经安全地离开那里了。

meaning: n. 吨\n[经] 吨
example: The truck was carrying over a ton of fresh fruit from the farms in the south.
exampleCn: 卡车载着一吨多的新鲜水果从南方农场运往北方市场。

meaning: a. 过度的, 过多的, 极端的\n[法] 过度的, 过分的, 额外的
example: Excessive charges.
exampleCn: 收费过高。

meaning: n. 精确, 正确\n[计] 准确度
example: He was beginning to doubt the accuracy of his compass.
exampleCn: 他开始怀疑指南针的准确性。

meaning: n. 品脱(干量或液量的单位)\n[医] 量磅, 品脱
example: He ordered a pint of ale at the bar and settled into the corner seat to watch.
exampleCn: 他在酒吧点了一品脱麦啤在角落的座位上坐下看屏幕上播放的足球比赛。

meaning: n. 翻译, 译文, 转化, 调任, 平移, 转译\n[计] 转换
example: A photograph is a translation of a scene onto a two-dimensional surface.
exampleCn: 照片是将场景转换到二维表面上。

meaning: a. 宝贵的, 珍贵的, 过于精致的, 珍爱的
example: Children are precious.
exampleCn: 孩子是宝贵的。

meaning: adv. 排他地, 仅仅, 专门, 只, 仅, 唯一地, 专有地
example: He works for Mr. Smith exclusively.
exampleCn: 他专门为史密斯先生工作。

meaning: adv. 近来, 最近

exampleCn: 最近，这些规则已得到执行。

meaning: adv. 简直不, 一定不, 仅仅
example: Had scarcely rung the bell when the door flew open.
exampleCn: 刚按门铃，门就开了。

meaning: a. 操作的, 运作的\n[法] 操作上的, 业务上的, 可起作用的

exampleCn: 经营困难。

meaning: adv. 自由地, 随意地, 无拘束地, 直率地, 坦白地, 慷慨地, 免费地, 大量地\n[计] 浮动地

exampleCn: 这幅画的特点是自由的笔触。

meaning: adv. 幸运地, 幸亏

exampleCn: 幸运的是天气很好。

meaning: n. 汽油\n[化] 汽油

exampleCn: 今年汽油价格急剧上涨因此许多人正在转向电动汽车。

meaning: adv. 以上, 向上

exampleCn: 碎片向上飞去。

meaning: n. 无意义的事, 荒谬言行, 荒唐

exampleCn: 无意义的音节。

meaning: n. 火箭, 烟火\nvi. 急升, 猛涨, 飞驰\nvt. 用火箭运载

exampleCn: 火箭在黎明时成功发射升空冲入清澈的蓝天后面留下了一缕白色烟雾。

meaning: n. 现在, 现时, 当今\nadv. 时下, 现今
example: It is solely by their language that the upper classes nowadays are distinguished.
exampleCn: 现在的上层阶级仅凭他们的语言来区分。

meaning:
n. 鼓, 鼓声
vi. 击鼓, 作鼓声
vt. 打鼓奏出
[计] 磁鼓
example: She tapped her fingers on the table like a drum while waiting for the exam results to be.
exampleCn: 她等着那天下午宣布考试成绩时手指像打鼓一样在桌子上敲着。

meaning: a. 活泼的, 鲜明的, 生动的

exampleCn: 热烈讨论。

meaning: a. 乐观的, 乐观主义的, 乐天的

exampleCn: 心情乐观。

meaning: n. 统治者, 管理者, 尺, 直尺\nn. 划线板\n[计] 标尺
example: The ancient ruler governed the kingdom with wisdom and the people lived in peace for more than forty.
exampleCn: 那位古代统治者以智慧治理王国人民安居乐业了四十多年。

meaning: n. 耐性, 忍耐

exampleCn: 学习一门新语言需要时间和耐心但回报值得每一分钟的努力。

meaning: adv. 然后, 后来
example: It didn't happen until afterward.
exampleCn: 直到后来这事才发生。

meaning: n. 跑步者, 赛跑者, 送信人, 走私船, 操作者, 滑槽\n[化] 碾碎机; 压碎机
example: He sent a runner over with the contract.
exampleCn: 他派了一名信使带着合同过来。

meaning:
a. 嫩的, 柔软的, 脆弱的, 温柔的, 亲切的, 未成熟的, 微妙的, 棘手的, 审慎的
vt. 使变嫩, 提供, 偿还
vi. 变柔软, 投标
n. 照料, 看管人, 供应船, 小船, 提出, 偿付, 投标
example: A tender heart.
exampleCn: 一颗温柔的心。

meaning: a. 间接的, 非直截了当的, 不坦率的\n[医] 间接的
example: Reflection from the ceiling provided a soft indirect light.
exampleCn: 天花板的反射提供了柔和的间接光。

meaning: pron. 任何人, 无论谁
example: Whoever finds the lost puppy will receive a small reward and the heartfelt gratitude of a very worried.
exampleCn: 谁找到那只丢失的小狗都会得到一份小奖励和一位非常担心的小女孩的衷心感激。

meaning: n. 鞭子, 抽打, 车夫, 搅拌器\nvt. 鞭打, 搅拌, 煽动, 召集, 仓促制成\nvi. 拍击, 急走, 抽打
example: The whip raised a red welt.
exampleCn: 鞭子扬起了一道红色的鞭痕。

meaning: a. 值得花时间的, 值得做的, 有真实价值的
example: A worthwhile book.
exampleCn: 一本有价值的书。

meaning: n. 渔夫, 钓鱼者, 渔船
example: The old fisherman set out before dawn and returned at sunset with a boat full of fish.
exampleCn: 老渔夫天没亮就出发日落时满载一船鱼带着灿烂的微笑回来了。

meaning: n. 良心\n[法] 良心, 道德感, 正义感
example: A person of unflagging conscience.
exampleCn: 一个有良知不屈不挠的人。

meaning: a. 有同情心的, 合意的, 赞成的\nn. 交感神经, 容易感受的人
example: Sympathetic neurons.
exampleCn: 交感神经元。

meaning: n. 确定, 确实的事情\n[法] 确定, 肯定, 必然的事
example: His certainty reassured the others.
exampleCn: 他的笃定让其他人都放心了。

meaning: a. 昂贵的, 奢华的, 费用大的
example: Costly jewelry.
exampleCn: 昂贵的珠宝。

meaning: n. 两星期
example: Most major tennis tournaments last a fortnight.
exampleCn: 大多数主要网球比赛持续两周。

meaning: n. 块, 瘤, 很多, 肿块, 笨人\nvt. 使成块状, 混在一起\nvi. 结块
example: A lump of coal.
exampleCn: 一块煤。

meaning: n. 便士, 一分, 小钱, 点滴\n[经] 便士
example: She found an old penny on the pavement and picked it up for luck as her grandmother.
exampleCn: 她在人行道上发现了一枚旧便士捡起来求好运就像她奶奶一直教她的那样。

meaning: n. 中间\nprep. 在...中间
example: In the midst of the crowd.
exampleCn: 人群之中。

meaning: n. 剩余物, 废墟, 残余\n[法] 遗体, 尸体, 遗骸
example: I threw out the remains of my dinner.
exampleCn: 我把剩下的晚餐扔掉了。

meaning: n. 仁慈, 善良
example: She was known throughout the village for her goodness and for the countless small kindnesses she showed.
exampleCn: 她因善良和每天对每个人无数的小善举而闻名整个村庄。

meaning: vi. 痊愈\nvt. 使复原, 使和解, 治愈
example: The quack pretended to heal patients but never managed to.
exampleCn: 庸医假装可以治愈病人，但从未成功。

meaning: n. 发烧, 发热, 热病\n[医] 发热, 热
example: In a fever of resentment.
exampleCn: 处于怨恨的狂热之中。

meaning: adv. 部分地, 一部分地, 不公平地
example: He was partially paralyzed.
exampleCn: 他部分瘫痪。

meaning:
n. 惊跳, 惊避
a. 胆怯的, 畏缩的, 迟疑的, 羞怯的
vi. 惊退, 乱投, 乱掷, 厌恶, 避开
vt. 乱投, 乱掷
example: He gave the ball a shy to the first baseman.
exampleCn: 他把球传给了一垒手。

meaning: n. 笔记本, 手册, 期票簿
example: She scribbled the idea into her notebook before she forgot it and later turned it into a bestselling.
exampleCn: 她在忘记之前把想法草草写进笔记本后来把它写成了一本畅销小说。

meaning: n. 立即, 瞬间\na. 紧急的, 立即的, 即时的
example: Instant gratification.
exampleCn: 即时的满足感。

meaning: a. 狂热的, 热心的, 热烈的
example: Enthusiastic crowds filled the streets.
exampleCn: 街道上挤满了热情的人群。

meaning: vt. 削弱, 减弱, 使虚弱\nvi. 变弱, 变软弱
example: The long illness had weakened him considerably but he refused to give up and slowly regained his strength.
exampleCn: 长期的疾病大大削弱了他的体力但他拒绝放弃并随着时间慢慢恢复了力量。

meaning: n. 教科书
example: His economics textbook is in its tenth edition.
exampleCn: 他的经济学教科书已经是第十版了。

meaning: a. 奇特的, 罕见的, 特殊的, 特别的\nn. 特有财产, 特权
example: The peculiar aromatic odor of cloves.
exampleCn: 具有丁香特有的芳香气味。

meaning: n. 轮胎\nvt. 装轮胎于
example: He pulled over to change the flat tyre on the side of the motorway as the rain began.
exampleCn: 他把车停在高速公路边换漏气的轮胎这时雨开始倾盆而下。

meaning: n. 好奇心, 新奇的事物, 珍品
example: The child's curiosity about the world around her led to endless questions about why the sky is blue.
exampleCn: 孩子对周围世界的好奇心引发了关于为什么天空是蓝色的鸟为什么会飞的无尽问题。

meaning: n. 机械人, 自动机械, 机械般工作的人\n[计] 机器人; 自动机
example: The factory now uses robots to assemble the products and the workers focus on quality control and design.
exampleCn: 工厂现在使用机器人组装产品工人们则专注于质量控制和设计。

meaning: vt. 弄宽, 加宽, 扩大\nvi. 变宽, 扩大
example: Widen the road.
exampleCn: 拓宽道路。

meaning: adv. 同样地, 也
example: Some people have little power to do good, and have likewise little strength to resist evil.
exampleCn: 有些人行善的力量很小，抵抗邪恶的力量也很小。

meaning: n. 注射, 注射剂\n[化] 注入; 注射
example: The nurse gave him an injection in his left arm and told him to rest for the afternoon.
exampleCn: 护士在他左臂注射了一针让他下午休息。

meaning: a. 垂死的\n[法] 快要死的, 垂死的, 临终的
example: A dying of old hopes.
exampleCn: 旧希望的破灭。

meaning: n. 插, 戳, 刺, 猛推, 口头攻击, 推力\nvt. 插入, 猛推, 刺, 戳, 强加, 延伸\nvi. 插, 刺, 戳, 延伸, (用力)推
example: The thrust of the jet engines.
exampleCn: 喷气发动机的推力。

meaning: a. 相当的, 一致的, 通信的\n[计] 对应
example: My Russian pen pal and I have been corresponding for several years.
exampleCn: 我和我的俄罗斯笔友已经通信好几年了。

meaning: n. 图书馆员, 图书管理员\n[计] 程序库管理程序; 程序库生成程序
example: The librarian helped me find three books about ancient Egypt for my school history project this term.
exampleCn: 图书管理员帮我找到了三本关于古埃及的书供我这学期的学校历史项目使用。

meaning: a. 无用的, 无效的, 无益的\n[机] 无用, 无价值, 无效
example: A kitchen full of useless gadgets.
exampleCn: 厨房里堆满了无用的小玩意。

meaning: n. 山羊, 替罪羊, 色鬼
example: A small white goat was grazing on the hillside near the old stone wall of the farm.
exampleCn: 一只小白山羊在农场老石墙附近的山坡上吃草。

meaning: a. 幸运的, 幸福的
example: Other, less fortunate, children died.
exampleCn: 其他不幸的孩子也死了。

meaning: n. 诱惑, 诱惑物\n[法] 诱惑, 诱惑物
example: He felt the temptation and his will power weakened.
exampleCn: 他感受到了诱惑，意志力也减弱了。

meaning: a. 使人不愉快的, 使人厌恶的, 煞风景的
example: An unpleasant personality.
exampleCn: 性格不讨喜。

meaning: v. 规定, 指定, 嘱咐, 开处方
example: The doctor decided to prescribe a mild painkiller and told her to get plenty of rest.
exampleCn: 医生决定给她开一种温和的止痛药并告诉她要多休息。

meaning: n. 前一天晚上, 一夜的逗留\na. 通宵的, 晚上的, 前夜的\nadv. 在前一夜, 整夜, 昨晚一晚上
example: An overnight trip.
exampleCn: 过夜旅行。

meaning: n. 头痛, 令人头痛之事\n[医] 头痛
example: She had a pounding headache after staring at the computer screen for eight hours without a break.
exampleCn: 她连续盯着电脑屏幕八个小时没休息后头疼得厉害。

meaning: n. 大学本科生, 大学肄业生\na. 大学生的
example: The undergraduate spent her summer working in a research lab alongside two senior professors at the university.
exampleCn: 那位本科生暑假在大学实验室和两位资深教授一起工作。

meaning: n. 发明, 创作能力, 虚构的故事\n[经] 发明
example: The invention of the printing press changed the world forever by making books available to ordinary people everywhere.
exampleCn: 印刷机的发明永远改变了世界使书籍可以被各地普通人获取。

meaning: n. 老虎, 虎, 凶暴的人
example: He's a tiger on the tennis court.
exampleCn: 他是网球场上的猛虎。

meaning: n. 贵族\na. 高贵的, 高尚的, 贵族的, 辉煌的
example: A noble tree.
exampleCn: 高贵的树。

meaning: a. 数学的, 精确的\n[机] 数学上的
example: A mathematical textbook.
exampleCn: 一本数学教科书。

meaning:
n. 增大, 隆起的部分, 巨浪, 肿胀
a. 优秀的, 一流的
vi. 增大, 膨胀, 肿胀, 增强, 骄傲
vt. 使膨胀, 使增大, 使上涨, 使骄傲
example: His ankle began to swell after he twisted it during the football match on Saturday afternoon.
exampleCn: 他周六下午在公园踢足球扭伤脚踝后脚踝开始肿了起来。

meaning: n. 雾, 迷惑, (割后的)最生草, 苔藓\nvi. 被雾笼罩, 变模糊\nvt. 使困惑, 以雾笼罩
example: A thick blanket of fog rolled in from the sea and covered the entire harbour.
exampleCn: 一层浓雾从海上滚来在短短几分钟内覆盖了整个海港。

meaning: a. 以前的, 某一时间的\nadv. 改天, 来日
example: Let's get together sometime.
exampleCn: 我们找个时间聚聚吧。

meaning: adv. 永久, 不变, 持久\n[计] 永久性的
example: He is permanently disabled.
exampleCn: 他永久残疾了。

meaning: n. 唾液, 唾吐, 小雨, 炙叉, 一铲的深度\nvt. 唾吐, 吐出, 降小雨, 用炙叉穿过\nvi. 吐唾沫, 吐痰, 唾弃, 飘霏霏细雨
example: It is considered rude to spit on the ground in most cultures around the world for obvious reasons.
exampleCn: 在世界大多数文化中出于显而易见的原因随地吐痰被认为不礼貌。

meaning: n. 嫌恶\nvt. 讨厌, 不喜欢
example: My dislike of him was instinctive.
exampleCn: 我对他的厌恶是本能的。

meaning: n. 疾病, 不健康, 呕吐\n[医] 病
example: Drugs have become a sickness they cannot cure.
exampleCn: 毒品已经成为一种无法治愈的疾病。

meaning: a. 喜欢的, 宠爱的, 温柔的
example: A fond embrace.
exampleCn: 一个深情的拥抱。

meaning: n. 电报, 电报机\nvi. 打电报\nvt. 打电报给, 电汇, 流露, 显示出要...的样子
example: The news of the victory was sent by telegraph and reached the capital within just a few short.
exampleCn: 胜利的消息通过电报发出在短短几个小时内就传到了首都。

meaning: n. 记录员, 录音机\nn. 记录器\n[计] 宏录制器, 记录器
example: She switched on the recorder and began to dictate her notes about the meeting that had just finished.
exampleCn: 她打开录音机开始口述关于楼上刚结束会议的笔记。

meaning: a. 能干的, 胜任的, 有效的, 足够的\n[经] 有权的, 授权的, 胜任的
example: A competent typist.
exampleCn: 一个称职的打字员。

meaning: a. 忠实的, 详确的, 可靠的\nn. 信徒
example: Years of faithful service.
exampleCn: 多年忠实服务。

meaning: a. 悲惨的；痛苦的；卑鄙的
example: He felt depressed and miserable.
exampleCn: 他感到沮丧和痛苦。

meaning: a. 未意识到的, 无意识的, 无知觉的\n[医] 人事不省的, 神志丧失的; 无意识的
example: Lay unconscious on the floor.
exampleCn: 躺在地板上不省人事。

meaning: n. 化学家, 药剂师\n[化] 化学家; 化学师; 化学工作者; 药剂师; 药房
example: The chemist spent years mixing different compounds before finally discovering the formula for the new life-saving medicine.
exampleCn: 化学家花了多年混合不同的化合物才终于发现了这种救命新药的配方。

meaning: a. 快活的, 高兴的, 兴高采烈的
example: Her cheerful nature.
exampleCn: 她性格开朗。

meaning: n. 哭, 哭泣\nvi. 哭泣, 流泪, 哀悼, 滴落\nvt. 哭着使..., 悲叹, 滴下
example: She could not help but weep with joy when she saw her son walk across the stage.
exampleCn: 看到儿子走上台领取毕业证书时她忍不住喜极而泣。

meaning: n. 凶手, 杀人者, 谋害者\n[法] 谋杀犯, 凶手
example: The murderer was finally caught after ten years when new DNA evidence linked him to the scene.
exampleCn: 凶手在十年后终于被抓获因为新的DNA证据将他与犯罪现场联系了起来。

meaning: n. 有希望之人, 有前途之人\na. 有希望的, 怀抱希望的, 保持乐观的
example: A line of people hopeful of obtaining tickets.
exampleCn: 一群人满怀希望地抢到票。

meaning: n. 苏打, 碳酸水\n[化] 纯碱; 苏打; 碳酸钠
example: She ordered a glass of soda with ice and a slice of lemon at the busy café near.
exampleCn: 她在火车站附近忙碌的咖啡馆点了一杯加冰和一片柠檬的苏打水。

meaning: n. 火把, 启发之物\n[化] 火炬
example: He switched on the torch and pointed the beam of light down the dark tunnel ahead of him.
exampleCn: 他打开手电筒把光束指向前方通向洞穴的黑暗隧道。

meaning: n. 终止, 终了, 收场\n[医] 末梢
example: I don't like words that have -ism as an ending.
exampleCn: 我不喜欢以 -ism 作为结尾的单词。

meaning: n. 墨水, 墨汁\nvt. 涂墨水于, 签署, 加墨水
example: Ink a pen.
exampleCn: 给钢笔墨水。

meaning: n. 喘气\nvi. 喘气, 喘息, 渴望\nvt. 气喘吁吁地说
example: She gave a gasp and fainted.
exampleCn: 她倒吸了一口气，晕了过去。

meaning: a. 马克思主义的\nn. 马克思主义者
example: The Marxist scholar argued that economic forces are the primary driver of all major historical changes over time.
exampleCn: 这位马克思主义学者认为经济力量是长期所有重大历史变革的主要驱动力。

meaning: vt. 窒息, 阻塞, 噎, 抑制\nvi. 窒息, 阻塞, 噎\nn. 窒息, 噎, 阻气门
example: Choke a carburetor.
exampleCn: 堵塞化油器。

meaning: n. 豌豆, 似豌豆的东西
example: She shelled a bowl of fresh peas from the garden and dropped them into the pot of boiling.
exampleCn: 她从花园里剥了一碗新鲜豌豆丢进炉子上沸腾的水锅里。

meaning: n. 旋转, 循环, 轮流\n[计] 旋转
example: The rotation of the dancer kept time with the music.
exampleCn: 舞者的旋转与音乐保持同步。

meaning: a. 嘈杂的, 喧闹的\n[机] 噪声的, 嘈杂的
example: A noisy cafeteria.
exampleCn: 喧闹的自助餐厅。

meaning: n. 汽车旅馆
example: They pulled into a dusty old motel by the roadside and rented a room for the night.
exampleCn: 他们驶入路边一家满是灰尘的老汽车旅馆租了一间房过夜然后继续旅程。

meaning: n. 憎恨, 仇恨, 憎恶\n[法] 敌意, 憎恨, 憎恶
example: The two families had been locked in a bitter feud for generations and the hatred ran deeper than.
exampleCn: 这两个家族陷入世代宿怨仇恨比任何人能完全解释的都要深。

meaning: n. 重复, 背诵, 循环, 复制品, 副本\n[机] 重复, 反复
example: Learning a new language requires patience and endless repetition before the words and phrases finally start to stick.
exampleCn: 学习一门新语言需要耐心和无尽的重复才能让单词和短语最终牢牢留在记忆中。

meaning: n. 讨厌的东西, 讨厌的人, 损害\n[医] 损害, 讨厌
example: The constant noise from the building site next door had become a real nuisance for everyone living.
exampleCn: 隔壁建筑工地的持续噪音已经成了街上每个住户的真正烦扰。

meaning: a. 坏的, 邪恶的, 缺德的, 刻毒的, 恶劣的, 淘气的
example: Under wicked fire from the enemy's guns.
exampleCn: 在敌人炮火的猛烈攻击下。

meaning: vt. 刺激, 使兴奋, 激励
example: Excite the audience.
exampleCn: 让观众兴奋不已。

meaning: n. 引用语, 语录, 牌价, 报价\n[化] 报价
example: Since he lacks originality he must rely on quotation.
exampleCn: 由于他缺乏原创性，他必须依赖引用。

meaning: n. 惊愕, 惊恐\nvt. 吃惊, 使惊愕\nvi. 惊起
example: The sudden loud crash from the kitchen startled the cat and it bolted up the stairs.
exampleCn: 厨房突如其来的巨响吓了猫一跳它一团毛模糊地窜上了楼梯。

meaning: n. 侍者
example: The waiter brought the menus and poured two glasses of water before taking their order with a warm.
exampleCn: 服务员拿来菜单倒了两杯水然后用温暖友好的微笑记下他们的点菜。

meaning: v. 大叫, 呼喊, 大声叫
example: The children exclaimed with delight when they saw the pile of brightly wrapped presents under the Christmas tree.
exampleCn: 那天早上孩子们看到圣诞树下那堆包装鲜艳的礼物时高兴得叫了起来。

meaning: n. 悲哀, 悲伤
example: She tired of his perpetual sadness.
exampleCn: 她厌倦了他永远的悲伤。

meaning: n. 桃子, 桃树, 桃色, 美人儿, 极好的事物\nvt. 告发\nvi. 告密, 检举
example: She bit into the ripe peach and the sweet juice ran down her chin as she smiled.
exampleCn: 她咬了一口熟透的桃子甜甜的汁水顺着下巴流下来她朝朋友笑了笑。

meaning: adv. 平滑地, 流畅地, 流利地
example: Put the plans into effect quickly and smoothly.
exampleCn: 快速、顺利地实施计划。

meaning: adv. 在下面\nprep. 在...的下面
example: A chest of drawers all scratched underneath.
exampleCn: 一个抽屉柜下面全都被划伤了。

meaning: n. 售货员, 推销员\n[经] 售货员, 店员, 推销员
example: The salesman knocked on the front door and began his well-rehearsed pitch about the new vacuum cleaner he.
exampleCn: 推销员敲了前门开始了他烂熟于心的关于他正在卖的新吸尘器的推销词。

meaning: n. 铝\na. 铝的
example: They replaced the old wooden window frames with lightweight aluminium ones that would never rot.
exampleCn: 他们把旧木窗框换成了轻质铝窗框，这种窗框永远不会腐烂。

meaning: a. 心神不安的, 不自在的, 不稳定的, 不舒服的
example: Farmers were uneasy until rain finally came.
exampleCn: 农民们焦躁不安，直到下雨了。

meaning: n. 鼓掌, 喝彩, 赞许
example: The crowd burst into loud applause as the young pianist stood up and took a graceful bow.
exampleCn: 当那位年轻钢琴家站起来在明亮的舞台上优雅鞠躬时人群爆发出响亮的掌声。

meaning: adv. 不寻常地, 异乎寻常地, (非正式)非常
example: She was unusually tall.
exampleCn: 她的身材异常高大。

meaning: adv. 目前, 不久
example: She will arrive presently.
exampleCn: 她马上就到。

meaning: n. 直译程序, 解释者, 口译者, 注释器\n[计] 注释器
example: His paintings reveal a sensitive interpreter of nature.
exampleCn: 他的画作展现了对自然的敏感诠释。

meaning: a. 粗鲁无礼的, 粗陋的, 粗暴的, 原始的, 未开化的, 大略的, 崎岖不平的, 狂暴的
example: Bales of rude cotton.
exampleCn: 一捆捆未经加工的棉花。

meaning: n. 流感, 流行性感冒
example: She caught the flu last winter and stayed in bed with a high fever for days.
exampleCn: 她去年冬天得了流感，发着高烧在床上躺了好几天。

meaning: n. 中尉, 助理人员, 副官
example: The lieutenant led his platoon through the dense jungle under the cover of darkness and reached the camp.
exampleCn: 中尉带领他的排在夜色掩护下穿过茂密的丛林黎明前到达了营地。

meaning: a. 可选择的, 随意的\n[化] 选购的
example: The final essay question was optional, so several students skipped it during the exam.
exampleCn: 最后一道作文题是可选的，所以几名学生在考试中跳过了它。

meaning: n. 主妇, 家庭妇女
example: The housewife prepared breakfast early before taking her children to school.
exampleCn: 这位家庭主妇很早准备好早餐，然后送孩子们去上学。

meaning: n. 拼, 拼字, 拼法\n[计] 拼写检查
example: He won the school spelling competition three years in a row by studying the dictionary for an hour.
exampleCn: 他连续三年赢得学校拼写比赛因为他每个晚上都花一个小时学习字典。

meaning: n. 运动场, 操场, 度假胜地, 活动场所
example: The children ran out into the playground as soon as the bell rang for the morning break.
exampleCn: 十点半早休铃一响孩子们就跑出来冲到操场上。

meaning: a. 便宜的, 不贵重的
example: Inexpensive family restaurants.
exampleCn: 便宜的家庭餐馆。

meaning: n. 咖啡馆, 酒店
example: She sat in a quiet cafe and watched the rain outside.
exampleCn: 她坐在一家安静的咖啡馆里，看着外面的雨。

meaning: n. 风筝, 筝帆, 空头支票, 骗子\nvi. 象风筝一样飞, 轻快地移动, 使用空头支票\nvt. 使上升, 骗钱
example: They took their son to the park to fly his new kite and it soared high above.
exampleCn: 他们带儿子去公园放他的新风筝风筝在温暖的微风中高高飞过了树梢。

meaning: n. 氮\n[化] 氮N-2
example: Nitrogen makes up nearly eighty percent of the air we breathe and is essential for all living things.
exampleCn: 氮气占我们呼吸空气的近百分之八十对地球上所有生物都是必不可少的。

meaning: a. 语法的, 合乎语法的\n[法] 语法上的, 符合语法规则的, 文法上的
example: Grammatical rules.
exampleCn: 语法规则。

meaning: n. 领导者, 指挥者, 售票员, 向导\n[化] 导体
example: The conductor raised his baton and the orchestra began to play the opening notes of the beautiful symphony.
exampleCn: 指挥举起指挥棒管弦乐队一起开始演奏那首优美交响乐的开头音符。

meaning: pron. 无论那一个, 任何一个
example: You can choose whichever dessert you like from the menu and I will happily pay for it.
exampleCn: 你可以从菜单上选任何你喜欢的甜点我会很高兴地为它买单作为生日款待。

meaning: n. 预防, 留心, 警戒\nvt. 预先警告
example: He put an ice pack on the injury as a precaution.
exampleCn: 作为预防措施，他在伤口上敷了冰袋。

meaning: n. 树胶, 橡皮, 橡皮糖, 牙床, 老天\nvt. 涂以树胶, 用胶粘, 使有粘性\nvi. 分泌树胶, 发粘
example: If you gum the tape it is stronger.
exampleCn: 如果你把胶带粘上，它会更坚固。

meaning: n. 粉笔, 白垩\nvt. 用粉笔写, 记录
example: The teacher used white chalk to write the answer clearly on the blackboard.
exampleCn: 老师用白粉笔把答案清楚地写在黑板上。

meaning: n. 抢掠, 抢夺\n[法] 强盗, 抢劫, 劫掠
example: The robbery at the jewellery shop shocked everyone in the neighbourhood.
exampleCn: 珠宝店的抢劫案震惊了附近的每个人。

meaning: n. 加仑\n[医] 加仑
example: He filled the car with ten gallons of fuel before setting off on the long drive.
exampleCn: 他昨天一早给车加了十加仑油然后出发长途驾车去海边。

meaning: a. 无疑的, 确定的\nadv. 无疑地, 确定地
example: Doubtless, this decision will affect the whole team for many years.
exampleCn: 毫无疑问，这个决定将在多年里影响整个团队。

meaning: vt. 放松, 松开, 解除\nvi. 变松, 松弛
example: Loosen the tension on a rope.
exampleCn: 松开绳子的张力。

meaning: a. 值得尊敬的, 荣耀的, 高贵的\n[法] 荣誉的, 正直的, 体面的
example: He made an honourable choice even though it cost him a great deal.
exampleCn: 尽管付出了很大代价，他还是做出了正直的选择。

meaning: a. 粘的, 有粘性的, 顽固的
example: Felt sticky and chilly at the same time.
exampleCn: 同时感觉又粘又冷。

meaning: a. 照相的, 摄影用的, 详细记录的, 逼真的, 酷似的
example: Photographic equipment.
exampleCn: 摄影器材。

meaning: a. 向上的\nadv. 以上
example: The cards were face upward.
exampleCn: 卡片面朝上。

meaning: n. 滚筒, 滚轴, 压路机\n[化] 滚柱; 托辊

meaning: adv. 向外地
example: She pushed the door outwards and stepped into the bright sunshine of the garden breathing in the scent.
exampleCn: 她把门向外推开踏入花园明媚的阳光中呼吸着新鲜玫瑰的香气。

meaning: a. 严肃的, 郑重的, 庄严的
example: A solemn promise.
exampleCn: 庄严的承诺。

meaning: a. 强烈的, 寒冷而干燥的, 活泼的\nvt. 使活泼\nvi. 活跃起来
example: A brisk walk in the park.
exampleCn: 在公园里快步散步。

meaning:
a. 愉快的, 高兴的, 宜人的
vt. 恭维, 使高兴, 取笑
vi. 开玩笑
adv. 非常, 极为
example: The jolly crowd at the reunion.
exampleCn: 团聚时欢乐的人群。

meaning: a. 故意的, 与目的有关的\n[法] 故意的, 有意的
example: Intentional damage.
exampleCn: 故意损坏。

meaning: vt. 污染, 弄脏, 玷污\n[化] 污染
example: Factories that pollute the river will face heavy fines under the new law.
exampleCn: 污染河流的工厂将根据新法律面临高额罚款。

meaning: conj. 以免, 唯恐, 免得
example: She spoke in a whisper lest the sleeping baby in the next room should wake up and start.
exampleCn: 她轻声耳语以免隔壁房间熟睡的婴儿醒来再次大声哭闹。

meaning: a. 无价值的, 无益的, 无足轻重的\n[法] 无价值的, 无用的
example: A worthless idler.
exampleCn: 一个毫无价值的闲人。

meaning:
n. 黄褐色, 鞣料, 马戏团
a. 黄褐色的, 鞣皮的
vi. 晒成棕褐色
vt. 把...晒黑, 鞣(革), 狠狠鞭打
example: After two weeks at the beach she returned home with a deep golden tan and a bag full.
exampleCn: 在海滩待了两周后她带着一身深金色的晒痕和一袋贝壳回家了。

meaning: n. 厘米, 公分
example: The shelf was just three centimetres too long to fit into the alcove so he had to trim.
exampleCn: 架子只长了三厘米放不进凹室所以他不得不用锯子把它锯短一点。

meaning: n. 坚实(或沉重)的脚步声, 流浪者\nvi. 践踏, 重步行走, 步行, 流浪\nvt. 走过, 踩
example: A homeless tramp.
exampleCn: 一个无家可归的流浪汉。

meaning: a. 每年的, 一年一度的\nadv. 一年一次, 每年
example: Yearly medical examinations.
exampleCn: 每年进行体检。

meaning: n. 佝偻, 屈从, 弯腰\nvi. 弯下, 屈从, 弯腰, 堕落\nvt. 使屈从, 使弯曲
example: I won't stoop to reading other people's mail.
exampleCn: 我不会屈尊去读别人的邮件。

meaning: n. 运动员, 冒险家
example: He was a true sportsman who always shook hands with his opponent and accepted both victory and defeat.
exampleCn: 他是一个真正的运动员总是与对手握手以同样的优雅和尊严接受胜利和失败。

meaning: n. 一口, 满口
example: He took a big mouthful of the hot soup and immediately regretted it because it burned his tongue.
exampleCn: 他喝了一大口热汤立刻后悔了因为这确实烫伤了他的舌头。

meaning: n. 序, 绪言, 前言\nvi. 作序, 写前言\nvt. 给...作序, 以...开始
example: She wrote a short preface to the book explaining how she had spent ten years researching the fascinating.
exampleCn: 她为这本书写了一篇简短前言解释了她如何花了十年时间研究这位被遗忘艺术家的迷人一生。

meaning: vt. 使变硬, 使僵硬, 使顽强, 使严厉\nvi. 变粘, 变硬, 变强烈
example: Stiffen the cream by adding gelatine.
exampleCn: 添加明胶使奶油变硬。

meaning: a. 狡猾的, 诡密的, 俏皮的, 偷偷摸摸的
example: Sly as a fox.
exampleCn: 狡猾如狐狸。

meaning: a. 大胆的
example: The most daring of contemporary fiction writers.
exampleCn: 当代最大胆的小说作家。

meaning: n. 尖锐的响声\nvi. 尖叫, 发尖声\nvt. 尖声发出
example: The little girl let out a sudden shriek of pure joy when she saw the puppy her parents.
exampleCn: 小女孩看到父母带回家给她的那只小狗时发出了一声纯粹的喜悦尖叫。

meaning: a. 荫凉的, 成荫的, 阴暗的, 隐蔽的\n[法] 成问题的, 令人怀疑的
example: A shady operation.
exampleCn: 一次阴暗的操作。

meaning: n. 极限, 最大限度, 极度\na. 极度的, 最远的
example: He tried his utmost.
exampleCn: 他竭尽全力。

meaning: a. 注意的, 留心的
example: Attentive to details.
exampleCn: 注重细节。

meaning: a. 富幽默感的, 滑稽的, 诙谐的
example: Humorous stories.
exampleCn: 幽默的故事。

meaning: n. 匆忙, 急忙
example: He soon regretted his haste.
exampleCn: 很快他就后悔自己的仓促了。

meaning: n. 虚荣心, 虚无, 自负, 空虚, 时髦的小摆饰
example: She checked the mirror out of vanity before walking into the crowded room.
exampleCn: 她出于虚荣照了照镜子，然后走进拥挤的房间。

meaning: n. 生物, 人类\na. 不免一死的, 人类的, 临终的
example: Mortal beings.
exampleCn: 凡人。

meaning: n. 强盗, 盗贼
example: The robber was caught on camera and the police identified him within hours of the footage being shared.
exampleCn: 强盗被摄像头拍到警方在晚间新闻播放画面后几小时内就确认了他的身份。

meaning: a. 麻烦的, 令人讨厌的
example: A troublesome infection.
exampleCn: 麻烦的感染。

meaning: a. 生锈的, 腐蚀的, 生疏的, 顽固的, 腐烂的\n[医] 锈色的
example: A rusty machine.
exampleCn: 生锈的机器。

meaning: a. 流利的, 流畅的
example: She is fluent in four languages and works as a translator for the United Nations in Geneva.
exampleCn: 她能流利使用四种语言在日内瓦联合国担任翻译。

meaning: a. 结果实的, 多实的, 产量多的
example: Be fruitful and multiply.
exampleCn: 硕果累累，繁衍生息。

meaning: a. 不公平的\n[法] 不公正的人; 不公正的, 不公平的, 不合理的
example: Unjust punishment.
exampleCn: 不公正的惩罚。

meaning: a. 狡猾的, 巧妙的, 可爱的\n[法] 狡猾的的, 狡诈的, 熟练的
example: Cunning kittens.
exampleCn: 狡猾的小猫。

meaning: a. 无价值的, 徒然的, 空虚的, 自负的, 愚蠢的
example: Vain about her clothes.
exampleCn: 对她的衣服很自负。

meaning: vt. 使悲伤\nvi. 悲痛, 伤心
example: It is natural to grieve after losing someone you love but time slowly heals the deepest.
exampleCn: 失去所爱之人后感到悲痛是自然的但时间会慢慢愈合最深的伤口。

meaning: a. 季度的, 按季度的, 每季的\nadv. 按季, 每三个月, 每季一次\nn. 季刊
example: Quarterly report.
exampleCn: 季度报告。

meaning: a. 无法忍受的, 承受不住的
example: The heat in the small room was unbearable and everyone sat fanning themselves with whatever they could find.
exampleCn: 小房间里的热度令人无法忍受每个人都用身边能找到的东西给自己扇风。

meaning: n. 毫米\n[机] 公厘
example: The bolt was just three millimetres too short to reach the hole and he had to rummage.
exampleCn: 螺栓只短了三毫米够不到孔他不得不在抽屉里翻找更长的。

meaning: n. 松紧带, 橡皮筋\na. 有弹性的, 能伸缩的, 可通融的
example: An elastic band.
exampleCn: 一根松紧带。

meaning: n. 电报, 一封电报\n[计] 电报
example: She received a telegram from her brother announcing the birth of his first child on a cold December.
exampleCn: 她在十二月一个寒冷的早晨收到了哥哥发来的电报宣布他第一个孩子的出生。

meaning: a. 跛足的, 僵痛的, 不完全的, 金属薄板, 不知内情的人\nvi. 变跛\nvt. 使成残废, 使无用
example: She wore a gold lame dress.
exampleCn: 她穿着一件金色的蹩脚连衣裙。

meaning: a. 更远的, 进一步的\nadv. 更远的, 此外, far的比较级
example: They live in the farther house.
exampleCn: 他们住在更远的房子里。

meaning: n. 觉醒, 奋起, 干杯\nvt. 唤醒, 鼓舞, 激动, 使振奋, 惊起\nvi. 醒来, 奋起
example: It took a loud knock on the door to rouse him from sleep.
exampleCn: 需要一阵响亮的敲门声才把他从睡梦中唤醒。

meaning: a. 公尺的, 公制的, 计量的\n[医] 测量的, 米制的, 公制的
example: Convert all the measurements to metric units.
exampleCn: 将所有测量值转换为公制单位。

meaning: n. 热心, 热衷, 热诚
example: He felt a kind of religious zeal.
exampleCn: 他感受到了一种宗教热情。

meaning: n. 叛逆, 不忠, 叛国罪\n[法] 叛逆, 通敌, 叛国罪
example: He was found guilty of treason and sentenced to life in prison for betraying his country.
exampleCn: 他被判叛国罪成立因将国家出卖给外国势力被判处终身监禁。

meaning: n. 裂缝, 投币口, 狭长裂口\nvt. 切开, 扯裂, 使有狭缝\nvi. 纵切, 纵裂
example: Slit her throat.
exampleCn: 割断她的喉咙。

meaning: n. 自动化, 自动操作\n[计] 自动学; 自动化
example: Automation replaces human workers by machines.
exampleCn: 自动化用机器取代了人类工人。

meaning: n. 晶体管\n[化] 晶体管
example: The invention of the transistor in the late 1940s revolutionised electronics and paved the way for the modern.
exampleCn: 二十世纪四十年代末晶体管的发明彻底改变了电子学并为现代计算机时代铺平了道路。

meaning: n. 口渴, 渴望\nvi. 口渴, 渴望
example: A thirst for knowledge.
exampleCn: 对知识的渴求。

meaning: n. 宿舍
example: She lived in the university dormitory for three years and made some of the closest friends.
exampleCn: 她在大学宿舍住了三年在那里结交了她一生中最亲近的一些朋友。

meaning: vt. 使失去能力, 使残废, (律)使无资格\n[计] 使无效, 禁止, 关闭
example: Disable this command on your computer.
exampleCn: 在您的计算机上禁用此命令。

meaning: vi. 同情, 怜悯, 同意, 体谅
example: I sympathize with your situation and want to help if I can.
exampleCn: 我同情你的处境，如果可以的话也想帮忙。

meaning:
vt. 使清新, 使恢复, 使生气蓬勃
vi. 提起精神, 恢复精神, 吃点心, 喝饮料
vt. 刷新, 重新整理
vi. 刷新, 重新整理
[计] 刷新, 重新整理
example: She splashed cold water on her face to refresh herself before the long and important meeting that afternoon.
exampleCn: 她在下午那个漫长而重要的会议之前用冷水泼了泼脸让自己清新一下。

meaning: a. 胆小的, 羞怯的
example: Whitewater rafting is not for the timid.
exampleCn: 白水漂流不适合胆小的人。

meaning: vt. 加快, 激发, 使有生气, 鼓舞, 使复活\nvi. 加快, 变活跃, 进入胎动期
example: His pace quickened as he turned the corner and saw the bright lights of the train station ahead.
exampleCn: 他拐过街角看到远处火车站明亮的灯光时步子加快了。

meaning: n. 公升\n[化] 升
example: He bought a liter of fresh milk from the small shop on the corner and carried it home.
exampleCn: 他从街角小店买了一公升新鲜牛奶用棕色纸袋装着拎回了家。

meaning: a. 胜利的, 得胜的, 战胜的
example: The victorious entry.
exampleCn: 胜利进入。

meaning: a. 欢喜的, 高兴的, 令人高兴的
example: Make a joyful noise.
exampleCn: 发出欢乐的声音。

meaning: a. 匆匆的, 轻率的, 性怠的
example: Made a hasty exit.
exampleCn: 匆忙退出。

meaning: a. 不仁慈的, 不亲切的
example: A thoughtless and unkind remark.
exampleCn: 一句轻率且不友善的言论。

meaning: n. 邮递员\n[法] 邮递员, 理财法庭的高级律师
example: The postman arrived at the same time every morning with a cheerful whistle and a bundle of letters.
exampleCn: 邮递员每天早上同一时间到达带着愉快的口哨腋下夹着一捆信。

meaning: n. 轻蔑, 藐视, 嘲笑, 被嘲弄的人\nvt. 轻蔑, 不屑做
example: She looked at the cheap imitation with pure scorn and turned away without saying a single word.
exampleCn: 她以纯粹的轻蔑看着那个廉价仿制品一言不发地转身离开了推销员。

meaning: n. 怪人, 同性恋者\na. 奇怪的, 不舒服的, 可疑的\nvt. 搞糟
example: Something definitely queer about this town.
exampleCn: 这个小镇肯定有些奇怪的地方。

meaning: a. 愤怒的, 愤慨的
example: An indignant denial.
exampleCn: 愤怒的否认。

meaning: n. 琐事, 少量\nvt. 浪费\nvi. 开玩笑, 翻弄, 虚度光阴
example: Do not trifle with safety rules when people are depending on you.
exampleCn: 当别人依赖你时，不要轻视安全规则。

meaning: n. 食品商
example: The grocer on the corner knew every customer by name and always saved the best apples.
exampleCn: 街角的食品商能叫出每位顾客的名字总是把最好的苹果留给放学后的孩子们。

meaning: a. 熟练的, 巧妙的\n[机] 熟练的
example: A lesser-known but no less skillful composer.
exampleCn: 一位鲜为人知但技巧不减的作曲家。

meaning: n. 朝西的方向\na. 向西的\nadv. 向西的
example: They traveled westward toward the setting sun.
exampleCn: 他们向着夕阳西行。

meaning: n. 胸部, 胸, 胸怀, 内部, 中间\nvt. 怀抱
example: His bosom was bursting with the secret.
exampleCn: 他的胸中充满了这个秘密。

meaning: n. 健身房, 体育馆\n[医] 体育馆, 健身室, 运动场
example: The school gymnasium was packed with parents and students for the annual talent show on Friday evening.
exampleCn: 学校体育馆上周五晚上挤满了前来参加年度才艺表演的家长和学生。

meaning: n. 变压器, 促使变化的人\n[化] 变压器
example: The transformer on the power pole exploded during the storm and the whole neighbourhood was plunged into darkness.
exampleCn: 暴风雨中电线杆上的变压器爆炸了整个社区陷入黑暗中长达数小时。

meaning: n. 暴风雪\n[化] 雪暴
example: A fierce snowstorm swept through the mountain pass and trapped a dozen cars on the winding road.
exampleCn: 一场猛烈的暴风雪席卷了山口把十几辆车困在蜿蜒的道路上整整两天。

meaning: n. 最坏, 最坏的时候\na. 最坏的, 最恶劣的, 最不利的\nadv. 最坏, 最糟
example: The worst that could happen.
exampleCn: 最坏的情况可能发生。

meaning: a. 象男人的, 强壮的, 适于男人的
example: Manly sports.
exampleCn: 男子气概的运动。

meaning: n. 春天, 春季, 初期
example: The garden looks its most beautiful in springtime when the cherry trees burst into delicate pink and white.
exampleCn: 花园在春天最美丽那时樱桃树绽放出娇嫩的粉白花朵。

meaning: n. 兴奋剂, 补品\na. 热忱的, 诚恳的, 有兴奋作用的
example: Cordial relations.
exampleCn: 关系亲切。

meaning: a. 憎恨的, 可恨的, 可恶的
example: No vice is universally as hateful as ingratitude.
exampleCn: 没有什么恶行比忘恩负义更令人憎恶了。

meaning: vi. 后悔, 懊悔, 忏悔\nvt. 后悔\na. 匍匐生根的
example: He began to repent his harsh words after seeing how deeply they hurt her.
exampleCn: 看到那些刻薄的话深深伤害了她后，他开始后悔。

meaning: n. 圆周, 周缘, 胸围\n[医] 周缘, 环状面
example: He had walked the full circumference of his land.
exampleCn: 他已经走了一圈他的土地。

meaning: n. 观光, 游览\na. 观光的, 游览的
example: They spent their first day in the city sightseeing and visited three museums and the old cathedral.
exampleCn: 他们在城市的第一天游览观光午饭前参观了三家博物馆和老教堂。

meaning: n. 黑人\na. 黑人的
example: The old negro spiritual songs have a deep and powerful history rooted in the long struggle for freedom.
exampleCn: 古老的黑人灵歌有着根植于为自由和人的尊严长期斗争的深厚而有力的历史。

meaning: a. 热衷的, 热诚的, 热心的, 热情的
example: She is a zealous supporter of animal rights and spends every weekend volunteering at the local rescue shelter.
exampleCn: 她是动物权利的热心支持者每个周末都在乡下的当地救助站做志愿者。

meaning: n. 会话, 对话\n[计] 对话
example: The dialog in the film felt so natural and real that the audience forgot they were watching actors.
exampleCn: 电影中的对话感觉如此自然真实观众忘记了他们是在屏幕上观看演员。

meaning: vt. 唤醒, 使觉醒, 激发\nvi. 觉醒, 醒来
example: She tiptoed into the room so as not to waken the sleeping baby who had been crying.
exampleCn: 她踮着脚尖走进房间以免吵醒那个昨晚哭了好几个小时的熟睡婴儿。

meaning: n. 放射性\n[化] 放射性
example: The workers wore protective suits to shield themselves from the dangerous radioactivity inside the old damaged reactor core.
exampleCn: 工人们穿着防护服以保护自己免受旧损反应堆核心内部危险的放射性伤害。

meaning: vt. 使烦恼, 使苦恼\nvi. 烦恼
example: Vex the subject of the death penalty.
exampleCn: 恼怒死刑的对象。

meaning: v. 使不愉快, 使(人)生气
example: He was careful not to displease his new boss on the very first day of work.
exampleCn: 在那家重要律师事务所上班的第一天他小心翼翼地不惹新老板不高兴。

meaning: a. 准时的, 守时的, 点状的, 中肯的\n[经] 准时的, 不误期的, 准时
example: She expected guests to be punctual at meals.
exampleCn: 她希望客人准时用餐。

meaning: n. 海港, 港口城市
example: The old seaport is now a quiet town with only a few fishing boats.
exampleCn: 这个老海港现在是一座安静的小镇，只有几艘渔船。

meaning: n. 不名誉, 使人丢脸的人/事, 耻辱, 不光彩\nvt. 使丧失名誉, 使受耻辱, 使丢脸, 奸污, 拒收, 无法偿付, 拒付
example: He would rather die than bring dishonour upon his family name which had been respected in the village.
exampleCn: 他宁愿死也不愿给他家在村里受尊敬多代的家名带来耻辱。

meaning: n. 夸脱\n[医] 夸脱(四分之一加仑)
example: She bought a quart of fresh strawberries from the farm stand and ate half of them before she.
exampleCn: 她从农摊买了一夸脱新鲜草莓还没到家就吃掉了一半。

meaning: n. 运货车, 四轮运货马车, (英)铁路货车, 流动服务车, 小型客车, 囚车, 童车
example: The old waggon loaded with hay creaked slowly along the dusty lane pulled by two tired grey horses.
exampleCn: 装满干草的老牛车在尘土飞扬的小路上吱吱作响在日落时由两匹疲惫的灰马拉着。

meaning: n. 祝贺, 恭喜
example: She sent a card of congratulation to her cousin who had just graduated at the top.
exampleCn: 她给表妹寄了一张祝贺卡表妹刚从医学院以全班第一的成绩毕业。

meaning: a. 周围的, 环境的\n[经] 环境的, 环保的
example: Environmental factors.
exampleCn: 环境因素。

meaning: n. 评估, 估定, 评定的款额\n[化] 评估
example: The assessment for repairs outraged the club's membership.
exampleCn: 维修费用的评估激怒了俱乐部的会员。

meaning: adv. 现在, 当前, 一般, 普通\n[计] 当前
example: Currently they live in Connecticut.
exampleCn: 目前他们住在康涅狄格州。

meaning: n. 失业, 失业人数\n[经] 失业
example: Unemployment is a serious social evil.
exampleCn: 失业是一种严重的社会弊病。

meaning: n. 犯罪, 冒犯, 违反, 罪过, 过错, 攻击\n[法] 犯法, 罪过, 过错
example: He took offence at my question.
exampleCn: 他对我的问题感到生气。

meaning: a. 社团的, 合伙的, 公司的\n[经] 团体的, 法人的, 社团的
example: Corporate rates.
exampleCn: 企业费率。

meaning:
n. 插座, 千斤顶, 男人
vt. 抬起, 提醒, 扛举, 增加, 提高, 放弃
a. 雄的
[计] 插座
example: You don't know jack.
exampleCn: 你不了解杰克。

meaning: n. 耶稣
example: The teachings of Jesus have inspired billions of people around the world for over two thousand years.
exampleCn: 两千多年来耶稣的教导激励了全世界数十亿人。

meaning: n. 会员的资格, 全体会员, 会员数目\n[法] 会员资格, 成员资格, 会籍
example: They polled their membership.
exampleCn: 他们对会员资格进行了民意调查。

meaning: n. 等级, 额定功率, 责骂\n[经] 等级评定
example: The restaurant has a five-star rating and has been voted the best place to eat.
exampleCn: 这家餐厅有五星评级连续三年被评为全市最好的吃饭地方。

meaning: n. 生产者, 制作者, 制作人\n[化] 发生器; (炉煤气)发生炉; 制气炉; 生产者
example: Maine is a leading producer of potatoes.
exampleCn: 缅因州是马铃薯的主要生产国。

meaning: n. 被告\n[经] 被告方
example: The defendant stood up in the courtroom and declared in a steady voice that she was completely innocent.
exampleCn: 被告在法庭上站起身来用沉稳的声音宣布她完全无罪。

meaning: n. 责任, 债务, 倾向\n[经] 责任, 义务, 负债
example: The company admitted liability for the accident and agreed to pay compensation to all the workers.
exampleCn: 公司承认了对事故的责任并同意向所有在现场受伤的工人支付赔偿。

meaning: n. 警告, 预告, 预兆, 通知\n[法] 警告, 警戒, 预告; 警告的, 注意的
example: A warning that still more bombs could explode.
exampleCn: 警告称可能还会有更多炸弹爆炸。

meaning: n. 基督, 救世主
example: The old church on the hill has been standing since the time of Christ and still holds services.
exampleCn: 山上的老教堂自基督时代以来一直矗立着至今每个星期天早上仍在举行礼拜。

meaning: adv. 特定地, 明确地, 按特性
example: A program specifically for teenagers.
exampleCn: 专门针对青少年的节目。

meaning: n. 进行, 程序, 行动, 诉讼程序, 事项\n[化] 会议论文集
example: The court began legal proceedings against the company after dozens of complaints were filed by former employees.
exampleCn: 在前员工提出数十起关于不公平待遇的投诉后法院开始了对该公司的法律诉讼。

meaning: n. 前提, 房屋连地基, 上述各项\nvt. 预先提出, 引出, 作为...的前提\nvi. 作出前提
example: The argument is based on the premise that all people are equal and deserve the same basic human.
exampleCn: 这一论点基于所有人平等并享有相同基本人权和机会的前提。

meaning: 债务转期
example: The new youth centre was built with funding from the local council and donations from businesses and residents.
exampleCn: 新的青少年中心由地方议会拨款和全城商家及居民捐款建成。

meaning: n. 治疗\n[医] 疗法, 治疗
example: Heat therapy gave the best relief.
exampleCn: 热疗能起到最好的缓解作用。

meaning: n. 发言人, 代言者
example: The spokesman answered questions from reporters after reading the official statement.
exampleCn: 发言人宣读官方声明后回答了记者的问题。

meaning: n. 结合体, 结合, 联合\n[经] 联合, 联盟
example: The two parties formed a coalition government after neither won enough seats to rule on their own.
exampleCn: 两个政党组成联合政府因为双方在大选中都未能赢得足够的席位单独执政。

meaning: n. 检查员, 巡视员\n[化] 检查员
example: The inspector arrived unannounced at the factory and spent the whole day checking every machine and safety procedure.
exampleCn: 检查员突访工厂花了整整一天详细检查每台机器和安全程序。

meaning: n. 评估, 估价, 求值\n[计] 鉴定; 评价; 求值
example: The teacher gave each student an evaluation with clear advice for improvement.
exampleCn: 老师给每个学生一份评估，并附上明确的改进建议。

meaning: n. 退休, 隐居, 撤退\n[经] 退休, 退股, (固定资产)报废
example: He took early retirement at sixty and spent the next decade travelling the world and writing a book.
exampleCn: 他六十岁提前退休在接下来的十年里环游世界并写了一本关于他许多冒险的书。

meaning: n. 公爵
example: The Duke owned a vast estate in the countryside and was known for his generosity to the villagers.
exampleCn: 公爵在乡下拥有大片庄园以对住在他土地上的村民慷慨大方而闻名。

meaning: n. 吉他
example: He picked up his guitar and began to play a soft melody that filled the quiet room.
exampleCn: 他拿起吉开始弹奏一段轻柔的旋律温暖柔和的声音充满了安静的房间。

meaning: n. 历史学家, 记事者
example: The historian spent years in dusty archives piecing together the long-forgotten story of the medieval village.
exampleCn: 历史学家在满是灰尘的档案室里花了多年拼凑出河边那个中世纪村庄久被遗忘的故事。

meaning: a. 临床的, 门诊部的\n[医] 临床的, 临证的
example: Clinical observation.
exampleCn: 临床观察。

meaning: n. 难民, 流亡者\n[法] 避难者, 流亡者, 难民
example: The refugee family fled their homeland with nothing but the clothes on their backs and a small bag.
exampleCn: 那个难民家庭逃离家园时身上除了穿的衣服和一小袋照片和证件外一无所有。

meaning:
n. 臀部, 蔷薇果, 忧郁
a. 熟悉内情的
vt. 使忧郁, 给(屋顶)造屋脊
interj. 喝彩声
example: She broke her hip in a fall on the icy pavement and had to spend six weeks.
exampleCn: 她在结冰的人行道上摔断了髋骨不得不在医院住了六周从手术中恢复。

meaning: n. 所赚的钱, 工资, 收入\n[经] 工资, 收入, 收益, 盈余
example: They saved a quarter of all their earnings.
exampleCn: 他们把四分之一的收入存起来。

meaning: a. 怀孕的, 充满的, 思想丰富的, 成果丰硕的\n[医] 妊娠的, 有孕的
example: A silence pregnant with suspense.
exampleCn: 沉默中充满了悬念。

meaning: n. 诉讼\n[法] 诉讼, 诉讼案件
example: The tenants filed a lawsuit against the landlord for failing to repair the heating system during the coldest.
exampleCn: 房客对房东提起了诉讼因为他在几十年来最冷的冬天未修好供暖系统。

meaning: n. 证言, 证据, 声明\n[医] 证据
example: According to his own testimony he can't do it.
exampleCn: 根据他自己的证词，他做不到。

meaning: adv. 不可避免地
example: When you work hard and never give up on your dreams success will inevitably follow sooner or later.
exampleCn: 当你努力工作永不放弃梦想时成功迟早会以某种形式不可避免地随之而来。

meaning: n. 牛仔裤, 牛仔布, 斜纹棉布
example: She pulled on her favourite pair of jeans and a cosy jumper before heading out into the chilly.
exampleCn: 她穿上最喜欢的那条牛仔裤和舒适的套头衫走进寒冷的秋晨散步。

meaning: a. 占优势的, 支配的\n[医] 优性的, 显性的
example: Television plays a dominant role in molding public opinion.
exampleCn: 电视在塑造公众舆论方面发挥着主导作用。

meaning: n. 参议员, (某些大学的)理事\n[法] 参议员, 上议员
example: The senator gave a passionate speech about the need for better healthcare in rural communities across the state.
exampleCn: 参议员就她所代表的州内农村社区需要更好的医疗保健发表了热情洋溢的演讲。

meaning: n. 恐怖分子\n[法] 恐怖份子, 恐怖主义
example: The police managed to track down the terrorist before he could carry out his planned attack.
exampleCn: 警方设法在恐怖分子实施对拥挤城市广场的计划袭击之前追踪到了他。

meaning: n. 长官, 法官, 推事\n[法] 司法行政官, 治安法官, 地方法官
example: The magistrate made a fair ruling after hearing both sides of the case.
exampleCn: 地方法官听取双方意见后做出了公正裁决。

meaning: n. 违反, 违背, 妨碍\n[法] 违犯, 违背, 违反
example: He claimed a violation of his rights under the Fifth Amendment.
exampleCn: 他声称这侵犯了他根据第五修正案享有的权利。

meaning: n. 侦探\na. 侦探的
example: The detective spent weeks piecing together the clues until she finally solved the mystery that had baffled.
exampleCn: 侦探花了数周拼凑线索直到她最终解开了困扰整个警察队伍多时的谜团。

meaning: n. 能力, 性能, 约束力\n[化] 能力
example: He worked to the limits of his capability.
exampleCn: 他竭尽全力工作。

meaning: a. 运动的
example: Athletic facilities.
exampleCn: 体育设施。

meaning: n. 斗士, 战士, 好战者, 战斗机
example: He was a fierce fighter in the ring but a gentle and kind person the moment he stepped.
exampleCn: 他在擂台上是一名凶猛的斗士但铃响后他走出擂台的那一刻就成了温柔善良的人。

meaning: n. 完成\n[经] 完井, 结束, 完工
example: The completion of the new bridge was celebrated with a ceremony attended by the mayor and hundreds.
exampleCn: 新桥的竣工通过上周六市长和数百名当地居民参加的仪式来庆祝。

meaning: n. 林荫路
example: They spent the rainy afternoon wandering around the shopping mall and ended up buying nothing except a cup.
exampleCn: 他们下雨的下午在购物中心闲逛最后除了买一杯热咖啡什么都没买。

meaning: n. 隐私, 隐居, 秘密\n[计] 个人保密权
example: She valued her privacy above all else and chose to live in a remote cottage.
exampleCn: 她最看重自己的隐私选择住在远离喧嚣城镇的偏远小屋里。

meaning: n. 印刷工, 打印机\n[计] 打印机
example: The printer ran out of ink halfway through the job and he had to rush to the shop.
exampleCn: 打印机打到一半没墨了他不得不赶去商店买新墨盒以赶在截止日期前。

meaning: n. 伊斯兰教
example: Islam is predominant in northern Africa, the Middle East, Pakistan, and Indonesia.
exampleCn: 伊斯兰教在北非、中东、巴基斯坦和印度尼西亚占主导地位。

meaning: n. 叙述, 故事\na. 叙述的, 叙事的, 故事体的
example: His narrative was interesting.
exampleCn: 他的叙述很有趣。

meaning: n. 保证, 把握, 信心, 保险\n[经] 保证, 担保, 保险
example: His assurance in his superiority did not make him popular.
exampleCn: 他对自己优越性的自信并没有使他受欢迎。

meaning: n. 改革, 创新\n[法] 创新, 改革, 刷新
example: The company invests heavily in innovation and has been granted over a hundred new patents.
exampleCn: 公司大力投资创新仅在过去五年就获得了一百多项新专利。

meaning: prep. 对...\n[法] 诉, 对, 相形
example: The final match of the tournament was Brazil versus Argentina and the whole world tuned in to watch.
exampleCn: 锦标赛最后一场比赛是巴西对阿根廷全世界都在收看这场激动人心的对决。

meaning: a. 令人不快的, 侮辱的, 攻击性的\n[法] 攻击的, 进攻的, 冒犯的
example: Considered such depravity offensive against all laws of humanity.
exampleCn: 认为这种堕落行为违反了所有人类法律。

meaning: n. 露齿笑\nv. 露齿而笑
example: She gave a shy grin when the teacher praised her essay in front of the whole class.
exampleCn: 当老师在全班面前表扬她的作文并给大家朗读了一段时她害羞地咧嘴笑了。

meaning: a. 合法的, 正当的, 婚生的\nvt. 认为正当, 立为嫡嗣, 使合法
example: Legitimate advertising practices.
exampleCn: 合法的广告行为。

meaning: n. 教员, 讲师\n[法] 指导者, 教员, 讲师
example: The driving instructor sat patiently in the passenger seat and guided her through the busy city streets.
exampleCn: 驾驶教练耐心地坐在副驾驶座上在她第一堂课时引导她穿过繁忙的城市街道。

meaning: n. 道德规范\n[医] 伦理学
example: The course on medical ethics challenged students to think deeply about the moral dilemmas doctors face.
exampleCn: 医学伦理学课程挑战学生深入思考医生在日常工作中面临的道德困境。

meaning: adv. 按自然规律, 完全地, 实际上, 真正地, 身体上地
example: It is physically impossible.
exampleCn: 这在物理上是不可能的。

meaning: n. 分界面, 接触面, 界面\n[计] 接口, 界面
example: The interface between chemistry and biology.
exampleCn: 化学和生物学之间的界面。

meaning: n. 手迹, 手稿, 正本, 手写体\nvt. 改编为演出本\n[计] 手写体, 小型程序
example: The actor spent weeks memorising the script before rehearsals began and could recite every single line by heart.
exampleCn: 演员花了数周熟记剧本排练开始前他在第一天就能背诵每句台词了。

meaning: n. 处方, 命令, 指定\n[医] 处方, 药方
example: I tried to follow her prescription for success.
exampleCn: 我试图遵循她的成功处方。

meaning: n. 怀孕；丰富, 多产；意义深长
example: She felt tired and nauseous during the early stages of her pregnancy but her husband was there.
exampleCn: 她在怀孕早期感到疲倦和恶心但她丈夫在每一步都给予支持。

meaning: a. 在下面的\n[经] 优先的, 基础的, 放在下面的
example: An underlying meaning.
exampleCn: 一个潜在的意义。

meaning: n. 适合, 合宜, 合理, 恰当, 健康\n[医] 适合性, 适应性
example: They had to prove their fitness for the position.
exampleCn: 他们必须证明自己适合这个职位。

meaning: a. 边缘的, 最低限度的, 有旁注的\n[医] 缘的
example: The marginal strip of beach.
exampleCn: 海滩的边缘地带。

meaning: n. 组成, 性格, 化妆品, 化装(术), 虚构, 补考
example: He missed the test and had to take a makeup.
exampleCn: 他错过了考试，不得不化妆。

meaning: adv. 彻底地, 绝对地, 透彻地, 详尽地, 周到地, 完全地, 完善地, 全面地
example: We searched the files thoroughly.
exampleCn: 我们彻底搜查了这些文件。

meaning:
a. 绝对的, 全然的, 纯粹的, 透明的, 峻峭的
vi. 偏转, 偏航
vt. 使急转向, 使偏航
adv. 完全, 全然, 峻峭
n. 偏航
example: Got the job through sheer persistence.
exampleCn: 凭借纯粹的坚持才得到了这份工作。

meaning: n. 长沙发, 睡椅, 卧榻\nvt. 横躺, 表达\nvi. 躺下, 蹲伏
example: He collapsed onto the couch after a long day at work and fell asleep within minutes still wearing.
exampleCn: 漫长的一天工作后他倒在长沙发上几分钟内就睡着了鞋和外套都还穿着。

meaning: a. 极度的, 华丽的, 极好的
example: A superb actor.
exampleCn: 一位出色的演员。

meaning: n. 咨询服务
example: The school provides counseling for students under heavy exam pressure.
exampleCn: 学校为考试压力很大的学生提供咨询服务。

meaning: n. 鲑鱼, 大麻哈鱼\n[医] 鲑
example: They caught a large salmon in the river and cooked it over an open fire with a squeeze.
exampleCn: 他们在河里捉到一条大鲑鱼在篝火上烤熟加了一点柠檬汁和一小撮盐。

meaning: vi. 顺从, 依从\n[法] 遵守, 承诺, 照做
example: You must comply or else!
exampleCn: 你必须遵守，否则！

meaning: n. 规格, 详述, 详细说明书\n[计] 规范; 形式说明; 说明; 说明书; 规格
example: The engineer checked every line of the specification to make sure the new bridge would meet.
exampleCn: 工程师检查了规格书的每一行以确保新桥符合所有严格的安全标准。

meaning: n. 断言, 主张, 申辩\n[法] 声明, 事实陈述, 断言
example: An allegation of malpractice.
exampleCn: 一项渎职指控。

meaning: n. 壁橱, 小室\na. 秘密的, 空谈的\nvt. 把...关入小室
example: She pulled out an old photo album from the back of the closet and spent the afternoon looking.
exampleCn: 她从壁橱深处掏出一本旧相册花了一个下午翻看她童年的照片。

meaning: n. 相互关系, 相关, 关联\n[医] 相关, 联系
example: What is the correlation between those two variables?
exampleCn: 这两个变量之间的相关性是什么？

meaning: n. 出席, 出席的人数, 照料\n[法] 管理, 照料, 资助
example: A student's attendance is an important factor in her grade.
exampleCn: 学生的出勤率是影响其成绩的一个重要因素。

meaning: adv. 拼命地；绝望地；极度地
example: The soil desperately needed potash.
exampleCn: 土壤迫切需要钾肥。

meaning: vi. 辩护, 恳求\nvt. 为...辩护, 提出...借口, 托称, 恳求
example: The lawyer decided to plead guilty on behalf of her client in the hope of getting a shorter.
exampleCn: 律师决定代表她的当事人认罪希望能从法官那里得到更短的刑期。

meaning: n. 诗, 韵文, 诗句\nvt. 用诗表达\nvi. 作诗
example: She wrote a short verse about the changing colours of the leaves in autumn and read it aloud.
exampleCn: 她写了一首关于秋天树叶变色的小诗在学校诗歌晚会上朗读了。

meaning: adv. 看来似乎, 表面上看来
example: The child is seemingly healthy but the doctor is concerned.
exampleCn: 孩子看上去很健康，但医生却很担心。

meaning: n. 盗窃, 失窃, 盗窃罪, 赃物\n[法] 盗窃行为, 偷窃, 失窃
example: The theft of the painting from the museum shocked the art world and the police launched an international.
exampleCn: 博物馆画作的失窃震惊了艺术界警方立即展开了国际调查。

meaning: adv. 其后, 从那时以后
example: Thereafter he never called again.
exampleCn: 此后他就再也没有打来过电话。

meaning: a. 可怕的
example: A dreadful storm.
exampleCn: 一场可怕的风暴。

meaning: a. 联盟的, 联姻的, 联系起来的
example: He allied himself with the Communists.
exampleCn: 他与共产党结盟。

meaning: a. 有资格当选的, 合格的\nn. 有资格者, 合格者, 适任者
example: Eligible to run for office.
exampleCn: 有资格竞选公职。

meaning: n. 快艇, 游艇\nvi. 驾游艇, 乘游艇
example: The billionaire's yacht was docked in the harbour and its gleaming white decks could be seen.
exampleCn: 亿万富翁的游艇停泊在港口闪闪发亮的白色甲板从海湾另一边就能看到。

meaning: n. 小派系, 内讧\n[法] 宗派, 派别, 小集团
example: A small faction within the party opposed the new policy and threatened to block its passage.
exampleCn: 党内一个小派系反对新政策并威胁要在下周阻止其在议会通过。

meaning: a. 尚未被人碰过的, 原封不动的, 完整的\n[医] 完整的, 无伤的
example: Fought to keep the union intact.
exampleCn: 为保持工会的完整而奋斗。

meaning: n. 内燃机, 柴油机, 柴油
example: The old diesel engine rumbled to life after several attempts and a cloud of black smoke puffed.
exampleCn: 旧柴油机经过几次尝试后轰隆隆地启动了黑烟从生锈的排气管中喷出。

meaning: n. 牛排, 鱼排, 肉排
example: He ordered a medium-rare steak with chips and a side of steamed vegetables at the quiet restaurant near.
exampleCn: 他在河边安静的餐厅点了一份五分熟牛排配薯条和一份蒸蔬菜。

meaning: n. 仲裁人, 调解人, 裁判员\nv. 仲裁, 裁判
example: The referee blew the final whistle and the stadium erupted with the roar of sixty thousand fans celebrating.
exampleCn: 裁判吹响了终场哨整个体育场爆发出六万名球迷庆祝主场胜利的欢呼声。

meaning: n. 细菌\n[医] [无芽胞]杆菌属
example: A single bacterium can multiply into millions within hours under the right conditions of warmth and moisture.
exampleCn: 在实验室培养皿适当的温暖和湿度条件下一个细菌可以在几小时内繁殖成数百万个。

meaning: n. 粗大的一头, 烟头, 靶, 笑柄\n[医] 对核
example: He deserves a good kick in the butt.
exampleCn: 他值得好好踢一脚。

meaning: n. 百合, 百合花\na. 洁白的, 纯白色的, 纯洁的
example: She placed a single white lily in a glass vase on the table and its delicate fragrance slowly.
exampleCn: 她在桌上的玻璃花瓶里放了一朵白百合它娇嫩的香气慢慢充满了整个安静的房间。

meaning: n. 痛苦, 悲惨, 不幸, 穷困
example: The misery and wretchedness of those slums is intolerable.
exampleCn: 这些贫民窟的悲惨和悲惨令人难以忍受。

meaning: a. 残忍的, 野蛮的, 不讲理的
example: Brutal beatings.
exampleCn: 残酷的殴打。

meaning: adv. 明确地, 肯定地, 无疑地, (非正式)确实地, 真正地
example: It was positively monumental.
exampleCn: 这绝对是具有纪念意义的。

meaning: a. 适宜的\nn. 试穿, 试衣, 装配, 装置
example: We have come to dedicate a portion of that field...It is altogether fitting and proper that we should do this.
exampleCn: 我们来奉献这个领域的一部分......我们这样做是完全合适和正确的。

meaning: n. 门槛, 入口, 开端, 阈\n[计] 阈; 阈值
example: On the threshold of manhood.
exampleCn: 就在成年的门槛上。

meaning: n. 轴, 箭杆, 矛, 矿井\nvt. 装杆于, 利用
example: The miners were trapped when the main shaft collapsed and the rescue team worked around the clock.
exampleCn: 主矿井坍塌时矿工们被困救援队昼夜不停地工作了三天才到达他们。

meaning: n. 道德, 教训, 品行\n[法] 道德, 道义
example: The novel explores complex questions of morality and asks what any of us would do when faced.
exampleCn: 这部小说探讨了复杂的道德问题问我们在面对两恶之间不可能的选择时任何人会怎么做。

meaning: n. 否认\n[法] 否定, 否认, 拒绝接受
example: It resulted in a complete denial of his privileges.
exampleCn: 这导致他的特权被完全剥夺。

meaning: a. 奇妙的, 稀奇的, 空想的
example: Fantastic Halloween costumes.
exampleCn: 梦幻般的万圣节服装。

meaning: n. 自我\n[医] 自我
example: His enormous ego made it almost impossible for him to admit that he was wrong about anything.
exampleCn: 他巨大的自我使他几乎不可能承认自己错了即使证据清楚明了。

meaning: n. 沙发
example: She curled up on the sofa with a thick blanket and a good book while the rain tapped.
exampleCn: 她蜷缩在沙发上盖着厚毯子读一本好书身后的窗户雨滴轻轻敲打着。

meaning: n. 再现, 复制, 生殖, 繁殖, 复制品\n[医] 生殖, 复现(心理)
example: Gutenberg's reproduction of holy texts was far more efficient.
exampleCn: 古腾堡复制神圣文本的效率要高得多。

meaning: adv. 冷嘲地, 挖苦地, 讽刺地, 令人啼笑皆非地
example: Ironically, he ended up losing money under his own plan.
exampleCn: 讽刺的是，他最终按照自己的计划赔了钱。

meaning: a. 金发的\nn. 白肤碧眼金发的人
example: Blond Scandinavians.
exampleCn: 金发碧眼的斯堪的纳维亚人。

meaning: n. 圆筒, 圆筒状物, 汽缸, 柱面\n[计] 柱面
example: The mechanic replaced the worn piston in the engine cylinder and the old car roared back to life.
exampleCn: 机械师更换了发动机气缸中磨损的活塞经过几声巨响后旧车轰隆隆地恢复了生机。

meaning: a. 发音清晰的, 口才好的\nvt. 明白地说, 以关节连接, 使成为系统的整体
example: Articulate speech.
exampleCn: 言语清晰。

meaning: v. (使)变柔软, (使)变柔和
example: Soften a shock.
exampleCn: 缓和震动。

meaning: a. 管理的\n[经] 管理上的, 经营上的
example: She took a managerial position at the company and was now responsible for a team of over fifty.
exampleCn: 她在公司担任了管理职务现在负责管理三个办事处超过五十人的团队。

meaning: adv. 节约地, 不浪费地, 节省地, 节俭地, 在经济上, 在经济学上
example: Economically this proposal makes no sense.
exampleCn: 从经济上来说，这个提议没有任何意义。

meaning: a. 分子的, 由分子组成的\n[医] 分子的
example: Molecular structure.
exampleCn: 分子结构。

meaning: n. 反应者, 反应器, 反应堆, 电抗器\n[化] 反应釜; 反应锅
example: The nuclear reactor was shut down for routine maintenance and a team of engineers spent two weeks inspecting.
exampleCn: 核反应堆因例行维护而关闭一组工程师花了两个星期检查内部的每个部件。

meaning: a. 使人信服的, 有力的, 令人心悦诚服的
example: A convincing story.
exampleCn: 一个令人信服的故事。

meaning: n. 铅版, 陈规, 老套\nvt. 使用铅版, 把...印制成盲文, 套用老套, 使一成不变
example: The film was criticised for relying on tired old stereotypes rather than creating characters that felt real.
exampleCn: 这部电影被批评依赖陈旧的刻板印象而非创造在银幕上感觉真实丰满的角色。

meaning: n. 细看, 仔细检查, 监视, 选票检查\n[经] 复查, 评核, 仔细检查
example: The minister's expenses came under intense scrutiny from the press and questions were raised about several large.
exampleCn: 部长的开支受到了媒体的严密审查关于几笔大额且无法解释的旅行报销的质疑被提了出来。

meaning: a. 决定性的, 坚定的, 果断的
example: Cast the decisive vote.
exampleCn: 投出决定性的一票。

meaning: n. 证实, 证明, 批准, 确认\n[计] 确认
example: Fossils provided further confirmation of the evolutionary theory.
exampleCn: 化石进一步证实了进化论。

meaning: n. 复杂化, 复杂情况\n[医] 并发症, 并发病
example: Her coming was a serious complication.
exampleCn: 她的到来带来了严重的并发症。

meaning: n. 从者, 属下, 追补者\n[电] 随动机
example: The singer has millions of followers who support her music online.
exampleCn: 这位歌手有数百万在线支持她音乐的粉丝。

meaning: n. 郡治安官, 县治安官\n[法] 司法行政官, 郡长, 执行吏
example: The sheriff rode into town on a dusty horse and tied it to the wooden post outside.
exampleCn: 警长骑着一匹满是灰尘的马进了城把它拴在酒馆外的木桩上然后推开弹簧门走了进去。

meaning: n. 朋友, 伙伴, 同志, 同谋\nvi. 交友, 结伴
example: He has been my closest pal since we sat next to each other on the very first day.
exampleCn: 从二十年前上小学第一天我们坐在一起时起他就是我最亲密的伙伴。

meaning: n. 评价, 估价\n[经] 评价, 评估
example: The manager sat down with each team member for an annual appraisal to discuss their progress and set.
exampleCn: 经理与每个团队成员坐下来进行年度评估讨论他们的进展并为来年设定明确目标。

meaning: a. 正统的, 传统的, 惯常的
example: Orthodox Judaism.
exampleCn: 正统犹太教。

meaning: n. 不合, 争论, 不一致\n[法] 不一致, 不同意, 陪审团的意见不一
example: A sharp disagreement over the budget led to the collapse of the talks and both sides left.
exampleCn: 预算上的尖锐分歧导致谈判破裂双方没有握手就离开了房间。

meaning: n. 男爵\n[法] 男爵, 贵族, 大王
example: An oil baron.
exampleCn: 石油大亨。

meaning: a. 内陆的, 国内的\nn. 内地
example: The town is five miles inland.
exampleCn: 该镇位于内陆五英里处。

meaning: n. 放逐, 流放, 被放逐者\nvt. 放逐, 流放, 使背井离乡
example: Men in exile dream of hope.
exampleCn: 流亡的人们梦想着希望。

meaning: n. 先例, 前例\na. 在先的, 在前的
example: The court's ruling set an important legal precedent that would influence similar cases for many decades to come.
exampleCn: 法院的判决设定了一个重要的法律先例将影响全国未来几十年的类似案件。

meaning:
n. 假货, 欺骗, 诡计
a. 假的
vt. 假造, 仿造
vi. 伪装
example: It isn't fake anything; it's real synthetic fur.
exampleCn: 这不是什么假东西；这是真正的合成毛皮。

meaning: n. 螃蟹, 偏航, 脾气乖戾的人, 沙果\nvi. 捕蟹, 偏航, 发牢骚\nvt. 使偏航, 抱怨, 破坏
example: He caught a crab and lost the race.
exampleCn: 他抓住了一只螃蟹并输掉了比赛。

meaning: n. 活瓣, 阀, 活门\nv. 装阀, 用阀调节
example: He turned the valve to shut off the flow of water and then began the long and delicate.
exampleCn: 他转动阀门关掉水流然后开始了修理那根破裂管子的漫长而精细的工作。

meaning: n. 愤怒, 狂暴, 狂怒的人\n[医] 狂乱, 狂暴, 狂怒
example: Hell hath no fury like a woman scorned.
exampleCn: 地狱没有比女人被蔑视的愤怒。

meaning: a. 能共处的, 可并立的, 适合的\n[计] 相容的; 兼容的
example: A compatible married couple.
exampleCn: 一对兼容并蓄的夫妻。

meaning: adv. 主要地, 显著地, 大多数地, 突出地
example: The patients are predominantly indigenous.
exampleCn: 患者主要是土著。

meaning: n. 命运, 定数
example: We are helpless in the face of destiny.
exampleCn: 面对命运，我们无能为力。

meaning: n. 军, 队, 部队, 兵种\n[医] 对, 团; 体, 物体
example: Diplomatic corps.
exampleCn: 外交使团。

meaning: a. 原因的, 因果关系的, 表示原因或理由的\nn. 表示原因的连词
example: A causal relationship between scarcity and higher prices.
exampleCn: 稀缺性与价格上涨之间存在因果关系。

meaning: n. 聚合物, 聚合体\n[化] 多聚体; 高分子; 大分子; 聚合物
example: The new polymer material is lighter and stronger than steel and could revolutionise the way we build cars.
exampleCn: 这种新的聚合物材料比钢更轻更强可以彻底改变未来我们制造汽车和飞机的方式。

meaning: adv. 伴随地, 偶然, 顺便
example: Incidentally, I won't go to the party.
exampleCn: 顺便说一句，我不会去参加聚会。

meaning: a. 机密的, 获他人信赖的, 易于信任他人的\n[经] 秘密件
example: A confidential secretary.
exampleCn: 一名机要秘书。

meaning: n. 礼貌, 谦恭, 好意\n[法] 优待, 礼貌, 恩惠
example: She sent a handwritten thank-you note as a courtesy to everyone who had helped make the charity fundraiser.
exampleCn: 她作为礼貌给每位帮助使慈善筹款取得如此巨大成功的人寄了一张手写感谢卡。

meaning: v. 偿还, 报答, 报复
example: He worked two jobs to repay the loan he had taken out to pay for his daughter's university.
exampleCn: 他打两份工来偿还为女儿大学教育借的贷款从未对此抱怨过。

meaning: n. 拯救, 救助, 救世
example: Tourism was their economic salvation.
exampleCn: 旅游业是他们的经济拯救。

meaning: vt. 施以, 加害, 使承受\n[法] 处, 加, 予以
example: The hurricane inflicted terrible damage on the coastal villages and thousands of families were left without shelter.
exampleCn: 飓风给沿海村庄造成了可怕的破坏数千家庭数周没有住所和清洁水源。

meaning:
n. 轻敲, 拍击, 责骂, 无价值的东西
vt. 轻敲, 厉声说出, 叱责, 抢走, 使着迷
vi. 敲击, 发敲击声, 交谈, 同情
[计] 随机存取程序, 资源分配处理器, 常驻汇编程序
example: It was a bum rap.
exampleCn: 这是一首流浪说唱。

meaning: n. 授权, 正当理由, 根据, 证明, 批准, 凭证, 令状, 委任状\nvt. 授权给, 保证, 担保, 批准, 使有正当理由
example: The emergency does not warrant all of us buying guns.
exampleCn: 紧急情况并不保证我们所有人都购买枪支。

meaning: n. 怨恨, 愤恨
example: Years of unfair treatment had built up a deep resentment among the workers and the union finally called.
exampleCn: 多年不公平的待遇在工人中积累了深深的怨恨工会终于在早春号召罢工。

meaning: n. 码头, 桥墩, 支框, 防波堤\n[医] 桥基, 基牙
example: They walked to the end of the wooden pier and sat with their feet dangling over the edge.
exampleCn: 他们走到木码头尽头坐下双脚悬在边缘看着太阳从平静的海面落下。

meaning: a. 冷酷的, 坚强的, 残忍的, 可怕的, 讨厌的
example: Grim determination.
exampleCn: 严峻的决心。

meaning: n. 兴味, 娱乐, 消遣\n[法] 娱乐, 娱乐活动
example: To the great amusement of everyone in the room the dog began to chase its own tail.
exampleCn: 令房间里每个人都忍俊不禁的是那只狗开始转圈追自己的尾巴将近十分钟不肯停下来。

meaning: n. 缺乏, 不足\n[医] 缺乏, 不足
example: Water is the critical deficiency in desert regions.
exampleCn: 水是沙漠地区的严重缺乏。

meaning: n. 乐观主义, 乐观, 乐天\n[医] 乐观主义, 乐观
example: Despite all the setbacks and difficulties she faced along the way her optimism never wavered and she pressed.
exampleCn: 尽管一路上遇到种种挫折和困难她的乐观从未动摇她每天带着微笑继续前进。

meaning: n. 不明确, 含糊\n[计] 二义性; 多义性
example: The ambiguity in the contract led to a lengthy legal dispute between the two parties that dragged.
exampleCn: 合同中的含糊不清导致双方之间漫长的法律纠纷拖延了数月没有解决。

meaning: n. 丰富, 充足, 大量\n[经] 丰富, 充裕
example: An age of abundance.
exampleCn: 一个富足的时代。

meaning: vt. 实践, 履行, 实行, 完成, 结束, 满足\n[法] 履行, 完成, 达到
example: He studied day and night to fulfill his dream of becoming a doctor and finally received his medical.
exampleCn: 他日夜学习以实现成为医生的梦想经过多年努力终于获得了医学学位。

meaning: n. 捐献, 订金, 订阅, 签署, 同意\n[化] 订购
example: The deed was attested by the subscription of his signature.
exampleCn: 该契约由他的签名证明。

meaning: vt. 使嘎嘎响, 喋喋不休地说\nvi. 格格响, 喋喋不休\nn. 格格声, 拨浪鼓, 喋喋不休的话
example: The death rattle.
exampleCn: 死亡的嘎嘎声。

meaning: n. 以鼻吸气, 嗅, 气息\nvi. 嗅, 蔑视, 嗤之以鼻\nvt. 闻, 用力吸, 发觉
example: Sniff the perfume.
exampleCn: 闻闻香水。

meaning: a. 华丽的, 灿烂的
example: A gorgeous Victorian gown.
exampleCn: 华丽的维多利亚时代礼服。

meaning: n. 系统陈述, 公式化, 配制\n[化] 表述; 数学表述; 数式化; 数学表述
example: He suggested a better formulation.
exampleCn: 他提出了一个更好的配方。

meaning: n. 法令, 判决, 天意\nvt. 颁布, 判决\nvi. 发布命令
example: The King only can decree.
exampleCn: 只有国王才能颁布法令。

meaning: n. 埃及人\na. 埃及的, 埃及人的
example: The Egyptian pyramids have stood in the desert for over four thousand years and remain one.
exampleCn: 埃及金字塔矗立在沙漠中已有四千多年至今仍是古代世界最伟大的奇迹之一。

meaning: n. 签证\nvt. 签发
example: She applied for a visa to visit China and spent weeks gathering all the necessary documents and photographs.
exampleCn: 她申请了去中国的签证花了数周收集申请所需的所有文件和照片。

meaning: n. 巧合, 同时发生\n[电] 符合计数器
example: He waited for the coincidence of the target and the cross hairs.
exampleCn: 他等待着目标和十字线的重合。

meaning: n. 养育, 营养物, 培育\nvt. 养育, 供给营养物, 教养
example: They debated whether nature or nurture was more important.
exampleCn: 他们争论先天和后天哪个更重要。

meaning: n. 踏, 步态, 梯级, 交尾, 鞋底\nvi. 踏, 行走, 交尾\nvt. 踩, 踏, 践踏, 跳(舞)
example: For fools rush in where angels fear to tread.
exampleCn: 因为傻瓜会冲进天使不敢涉足的地方。

meaning: adv. 敏捷地, 迅速地
example: The rescue squad arrived promptly.
exampleCn: 救援队迅速赶到。

meaning: n. 连接, 附属物, 连接物, 爱慕\n[计] 附加, 附件
example: Attachment to a formal agenda.
exampleCn: 正式议程的附件。
