example: He packed clean underwear before leaving for the weekend trip.
exampleCn: 周末旅行出发前，他收拾好了干净的内衣。

meaning: n. 污染, 污物\n[化] 污染; 沾污
example: The contamination of the river led to a cleanup that lasted over two years.
exampleCn: 河流污染导致了一场持续两年多的清理行动。

meaning: n. 看不见, 失踪, 消失
example: He regretted the disappearance of Greek from school curricula.
exampleCn: 他对希腊语从学校课程中消失感到遗憾。

meaning: n. 保持, 留置, 保留, 保持力, 保留物, 记忆, 停滞, 固位\n[计] 保贸, 保持
example: Better pay and flexible hours improved staff retention at the company.
exampleCn: 更高的薪酬和弹性工作时间提高了公司的员工留存率。

meaning: n. 似非而是的论点, 自相矛盾的话, 悖论, 怪人怪事\n[化] 佯谬
example: `I always lie' is a paradox because if it is true it must be false.
exampleCn: “我总是撒谎”是一个悖论，因为如果它是真的，那么它一定是假的。

meaning: n. 接近, 亲近
example: The apartment is in close proximity to the station, so commuting is easy.
exampleCn: 这套公寓离车站很近，所以通勤很方便。

meaning:
n. 支柱, 曲柄, 支撑, 一对
vt. 紧缚, 支撑, 激励
vi. 打起精神
[计] 花括号
example: He wore a brace on his knee.
exampleCn: 他的膝盖上戴着一个支架。

meaning: n. 随后发生的事情, 结果\na. 作为结果的, 合乎逻辑的
example: The period of tension and consequent need for military preparedness.
exampleCn: 紧张时期以及随之而来的军事准备的需要。

meaning: n. 说教, 启示, 布道
example: The vicar delivered a moving sermon about the importance of kindness and forgiveness to a packed congregation.
exampleCn: 牧师在一月一个寒冷的星期天向满座的会众发表了一篇关于善良和宽恕重要性的动人布道。

meaning: a. 严厉的, 严酷的, 严格的, 苛刻的, 严密的, 精确的
example: Rigorous application of the law.
exampleCn: 严格适用法律。

meaning: a. 强健的, 健全的\n[医] 羊晕倒病, 羊蹒跚病
example: Sturdy young athletes.
exampleCn: 坚强的年轻运动员。

meaning: vi. 变宽, 扩大\nvt. 放宽, 使扩大
example: Broaden the road.
exampleCn: 拓宽道路。

meaning: n. 附件, 围墙, 围绕\n[化] 机壳; 外壳
example: The zoo built a large new enclosure for the elephants with a pool and plenty of shade.
exampleCn: 动物园为大象建了一个大新围栏带有一个水池和大量阴凉处游客可以观看它们玩耍和洗澡。

meaning: n. 禁令, 禁止
example: In 1920 the 18th amendment to the Constitution established prohibition in the US.
exampleCn: 1920年，美国宪法第18修正案确立了禁酒令。

meaning: n. 女神, 美女, 受崇拜的女性
example: The marble goddess stood in the centre of the fountain.
exampleCn: 大理石女神像矗立在喷泉中央。

meaning: n. 边缘, 边界, 起始点\nvi. 处在边缘, 接近, 下沉, 趋向
example: On the verge of tears.
exampleCn: 已经快要落泪了。

meaning: vt. 使停止, 扣留, 保留, 拒给\nvi. 克制, 忍住
example: She decided to withhold the bad news until the children finished their exams.
exampleCn: 她决定等孩子们考完试后再告诉他们这个坏消息。

meaning: a. 诊断的, 有助于诊断的, 特征的\nn. 诊断, 病的征候, 诊断法\n[计] 诊断的
example: A diagnostic reading test.
exampleCn: 诊断性阅读测试。

meaning: vt. 超越, 胜过
example: The film's message of hope and courage seemed to transcend cultural boundaries and touched audiences in every country.
exampleCn: 这部电影希望与勇气的信息似乎超越了文化界限触动了世界上每个放映国家的观众。

meaning: n. 妒忌, 猜忌, 羡慕\n[法] 妒忌, 嫉妒, 猜忌
example: Cherish their official political freedom with fierce jealousy.
exampleCn: 怀着强烈的嫉妒心珍惜他们的官方政治自由。

meaning: n. 加热器, 灯丝, 加热工\n[化] 加热器
example: She switched on the portable heater and placed it near her desk to keep her feet warm.
exampleCn: 她打开便携加热器放在桌子旁边以便在寒冷的冬夜工作时保持脚暖和。

meaning: n. 爆发, 喷出物, 出疹\n[化] 喷发
example: The volcanic eruption sent a towering cloud of ash into the sky and forced the closure of airports.
exampleCn: 火山喷发将高耸的灰云冲上天空迫使整个大陆的机场关闭了近一周。

meaning: n. 箔, 烘托, 衬托\nvt. 贴箔于, 衬托, 阻止, 挡开, 挫败
example: The photographic film was wrapped in foil.
exampleCn: 照相胶片用箔纸包裹。

meaning: n. 举, 抛, 起伏, 鼓起\nvt. 用力举起, 使举起, 使鼓起\nvi. 抛出, 起伏, 喘息, 凸起
example: He gave it a mighty heave.
exampleCn: 他用力一举。

meaning: a. 合成的, 混合成的, 菊科的\nn. 合成物, 复合材料, 菊科
example: The bridge uses a composite material that is both strong and light.
exampleCn: 这座桥使用了一种既坚固又轻便的复合材料。

meaning: a. 无限的, 不受限制的, 无条件的\n[经] 无限的, 不定的
example: To start with a theory of unlimited freedom is to end up with unlimited despotism.
exampleCn: 以无限自由的理论开始，就会以无限的专制结束。

meaning: n. 对称, 匀称\n[化] 对称; 对称性; 对称现象
example: The perfect symmetry of the butterfly's wings amazed the children who stood in a silent circle watching it.
exampleCn: 蝴蝶翅膀完美的对称性让孩子们惊叹他们围成静默的一圈看它停在鲜艳的花朵上。

meaning: n. 女海妖, 妖女, 警报器, 汽笛, 迷人的美女\na. 诱惑的\nvi. 响着警报器前进
example: Odysseus ordered his crew to plug their ears so they would not hear the Siren's fatal song.
exampleCn: 奥德修斯命令他的船员堵住耳朵，这样他们就不会听到海妖致命的歌声。

meaning: n. 贪欲, 贪婪
example: His greed for money eventually destroyed the business he had built.
exampleCn: 他对金钱的贪婪最终毁掉了自己建立的生意。

meaning: n. 百万富翁, 大富豪\n[经] 大资本家, 巨富, 百万富翁
example: She became a millionaire after selling her small software company.
exampleCn: 她卖掉自己的小软件公司后成了百万富翁。

meaning: n. 航天空间, 航天技术
example: The aerospace engineer helped design parts for a new satellite.
exampleCn: 这位航空航天工程师参与设计了一颗新卫星的部件。

meaning: n. 小狗, 小动物, 自负的年轻人
example: The children squealed with delight when their father brought home a tiny golden puppy with big floppy ears.
exampleCn: 当父亲带回家一只长着大垂耳和摇个不停的小尾巴的金色小狗时孩子们高兴地尖叫起来。

meaning:
n. 嗡嗡声, 哼声, 杂声
vi. 发低哼声
vt. 哼, 用哼声表示
interj. 哼, 嗯
example: There is a constant hum of military preparation.
exampleCn: 军事准备的嗡嗡声持续不断。

meaning: a. 可疑的, 不确定的
example: Dubious about agreeing to go.
exampleCn: 犹豫是否同意去。

meaning: n. 称赞, 恭维, 敬意\nvt. 称赞, 褒扬, 恭维
example: She received a lovely compliment from a stranger about her painting and it made her smile.
exampleCn: 她收到了一个陌生人对她的画的可爱赞美让她在剩下的漫长一天里都面带微笑。

meaning: n. 不符合, 差异, 不相符之处\n[化] 不符值; 偏差值
example: The auditor noticed a small discrepancy in the accounts and spent the next three days tracing.
exampleCn: 审计员注意到账目中的一个小差异花了接下来三天时间将每笔交易追溯回原始来源。

meaning: n. 小丑, 乡下人
example: The clown made balloon animals for the children at the party and his silly jokes had everyone laughing.
exampleCn: 小丑在派对上为孩子们做了气球动物他傻傻的笑话让每个人都笑得肚子疼。

meaning: n. 暮光, 曙光, 黎明, 黄昏, 微光, 朦胧状态\na. 微明的
example: He loved the twilight.
exampleCn: 他喜欢黄昏。

meaning: vt. 开...的锁, 开启, 表露, 放出\nvi. 被开启, 揭开, 解放\n[计] 解出锁定
example: Unlock the door.
exampleCn: 打开门。

meaning: a. 悲哀的, 可怜的, 感伤的, 差劲的\n[医] 感情的
example: The shabby room struck her as extraordinarily pathetic.
exampleCn: 这间破旧的房间让她觉得格外可怜。

meaning: adv. 松弛地, 宽松地, 不紧
example: His hands lay loosely.
exampleCn: 他的手松开了。

meaning: a. 易受影响的, 易感动的, 容许...的\n[法] 易感的, 易受影响的, 容许
example: Susceptible to colds.
exampleCn: 容易感冒。

meaning: n. 免疫, 免疫性, 免除\n[化] 免疫性
example: Immunity to criticism.
exampleCn: 不受批评。

meaning: n. 努力, 力图, 尽力\nvi. 努力, 力图, 尽力
example: She will endeavour to finish the difficult project before Friday.
exampleCn: 她会努力在周五前完成这个困难项目。

meaning: n. 转移\n[医] 转向
example: Scuba diving is provided as a diversion for tourists.
exampleCn: 提供水肺潜水作为游客的消遣。

meaning: n. 装船, 出货\n[经] 运送, 运送(寄出)货物, 装载
example: The shipment of medical supplies arrived at the port after the storm.
exampleCn: 那批医疗物资在风暴后抵达了港口。

meaning: n. 苦味, 悲痛, 怨恨
example: There was no bitterness in her voice when she spoke about the past only a quiet acceptance.
exampleCn: 当她谈及过去时声音里没有怨恨只有对发生之事的平静接受和对更好日子的希望。

meaning:
n. 松弛, 松懈, 淡季, 闲散, 家常裤
a. 松弛的, 不流畅的, 疏忽的, 无力的, 呆滞的, 软弱的, 漏水的
adv. 马虎地, 缓慢地
vt. 放松, 使缓慢
vi. 松懈, 减弱, 松弛
example: A gradual slack in output.
exampleCn: 产出逐渐疲软。

meaning: vi. 足够, 有能力\nvt. 满足
example: A 'B' grade doesn't suffice to get me into medical school.
exampleCn: “B”成绩不足以让我进入医学院。

meaning: a. 善良的, 良性的\n[医] 良性的
example: A benign smile.
exampleCn: 一个善意的微笑。

meaning: n. 高潮, 极点, 层进法\nv. (使)达到顶点, (使)达到高潮
example: The climax of the artist's career.
exampleCn: 艺术家职业生涯的顶峰。

meaning: adv. 有系统地, 有组织地, 有条理地
example: They systematically excluded women.
exampleCn: 他们系统地排斥女性。

meaning: n. 模仿, 效法, 冒充, 赝品\n[医] 模仿, 仿制, 仿制品
example: Decorated with imitation palm leaves.
exampleCn: 饰有仿棕榈叶。

meaning: a. 有...倾向的, 易于的, 恰当的, 聪明的\n[计] 自动数控语言, 自动图象传输, 自动程序控制, 自动程序设计工具
example: He is apt to ignore matters he considers unimportant.
exampleCn: 他很容易忽视他认为不重要的事情。

meaning: n. 用力的投掷\nvt. 用力投掷, 发射, 愤慨地说出, 丢下\nvi. 猛投, 猛掷
example: Hurl insults.
exampleCn: 辱骂。

meaning: vt. 预先排除, 预防, 阻止, 妨碍\n[法] 预防, 排除, 消除
example: His lack of money did not preclude him from attending the course.
exampleCn: 缺钱并没有阻止他参加这门课程。

meaning:
n. 蹒跚, 踌躇
vi. 蹒跚, 犹豫
vt. 使摇摆, 使踌躇, 交错, 错开
a. 交错的, 错开的
example: Stagger the chairs in the lecture hall.
exampleCn: 将演讲厅的椅子错开。

meaning: vt. 二等分, 对半分享, 把...减半
example: Halve the cake.
exampleCn: 将蛋糕减半。

meaning: n. 清洗, 染发, 染发剂\nvt. 以清水冲洗, 漱, 漂清\nvi. 被漂净
example: She rinsed the soap off the dishes under the hot tap and stacked them neatly on the rack.
exampleCn: 她在热水龙头下把盘子上的肥皂冲干净把它们整齐地堆在架子上在温暖的午后空气中晾干。

meaning: interj. 唉
example: Alas, I cannot stay.
exampleCn: 唉，我不能留下来。

meaning: a. 有感染力的, 动人的, 恳求的
example: He added an appealing and memorable figure to popular American mythology.
exampleCn: 他为流行的美国神话增添了一个吸引人且令人难忘的人物。

meaning: a. 钝的, 坦率的, 麻痹的
example: Blunt the knives.
exampleCn: 把刀弄钝。

meaning: vt. 胜过, 优于, 擅长\nvi. 胜过其他
example: She continued to excel in mathematics throughout high school.
exampleCn: 她在整个高中阶段一直擅长数学。

meaning: a. 邮政的, 邮局的\n[经] 邮政的
example: Postal delivery.
exampleCn: 邮政递送。

meaning: a. 有传染性的, 易传染的\n[医] 传染性的
example: Fear is exceedingly infectious; children catch it from their elders.
exampleCn: 恐惧具有极强的传染性。孩子们是从长辈那里感染的。

meaning: n. 赞美诗, 圣歌\nv. 唱赞美歌
example: The choir sang a hymn as the morning light filled the church.
exampleCn: 晨光洒满教堂时，唱诗班唱起了一首赞美诗。

meaning: a. 性质的, 质的, 定性的
example: Qualitative change.
exampleCn: 质的改变。

meaning: a. 反驳的, 反对的, 抗辩的\nn. 矛盾因素, 对立物
example: `perfect' and `imperfect' are contradictory terms.
exampleCn: “完美”和“不完美”是矛盾的术语。

meaning: a. 残渣的, 剩余的\nn. 残渣, 剩余, 余数
example: Residual quantity.
exampleCn: 剩余数量。

meaning: vt. 使相等, 视为平等\nvi. 等同
example: You cannot equate success in financial matters with greed.
exampleCn: 你不能将财务上的成功等同于贪婪。

meaning: n. 炖, 烦恼, 热浴, 妓院, 鱼塘\nvi. 炖, 焖, 忧虑\nvt. 炖, 焖, 使焦虑
example: Don't get in a stew.
exampleCn: 不要进入炖菜。

meaning: n. 母性, 怀孕, 妇产科医院\na. 产妇的
example: She took maternity leave after the birth of her daughter.
exampleCn: 女儿出生后，她休了产假。

meaning: n. 凹槽, 惯例, 理想境况\nvt. 开槽于
example: Groove a vinyl record.
exampleCn: 给黑胶唱片刻上凹槽。

meaning: vt. 使瘫痪, 使麻痹\n[医] 使麻痹, 使瘫痪
example: The snake venom can paralyze a small animal within minutes.
exampleCn: 蛇毒可以在几分钟内使小动物瘫痪。

meaning: n. 餐巾, 餐巾纸, 尿布
example: She placed a napkin on her lap before the meal began.
exampleCn: 用餐开始前，她把餐巾放在膝上。

meaning: n. 猩红色, 绯红色, 红衣\na. 绯红色的, 鲜红色的
example: She wore a stunning scarlet dress to the ball and every head in the room turned to watch.
exampleCn: 她穿着一条惊艳的猩红色连衣裙参加舞会房间里每个人的头都转过去看着她优雅地走下华丽的楼梯。

meaning: n. 步道, 人行道, 小路
example: They followed the narrow footpath through the woods and emerged at the top of a hill.
exampleCn: 他们沿着林中的狭窄小路行走出现在山顶上看到了下面山谷的壮丽景色。

meaning: a. 舒适的, 安逸的, 惬意的\nn. (茶壶等的)保暖罩, 舒适的座位\nvt. 以假话使安心
example: A cozy nook near the fire.
exampleCn: 靠近火炉的舒适角落。

meaning: n. 术语, 术语学\n[医] 名词学, 命名法
example: Legal terminology.
exampleCn: 法律术语。

meaning: a. 乳状的, 乳白色的, 柔和的
example: Milky glass.
exampleCn: 乳白色玻璃。

meaning: a. 好战的
example: Militant nations.
exampleCn: 好战的国家。

meaning: n. 缝合线, 衔接口, 接缝, 线缝, 伤疤\nvt. 缝合, 接合, 焊合, 使留下伤痕\nvi. 裂开, 发生裂痕
example: Seam a dress.
exampleCn: 缝一件衣服。

meaning: n. 杂乱一团, 混乱, 拥挤\nvt. 把...挤在一起, 乱堆, 草率了事, 蜷曲\nvi. 挤作一团, 蜷缩
example: A huddle of frightened women.
exampleCn: 一群受惊的妇女。

meaning: n. 阳性, 男性\na. 男性的, 阳性的, 有丈夫气的
example: A masculine cadence.
exampleCn: 阳刚的节奏。

meaning: n. 堡垒, 要塞, 易货站\nvt. 设要塞保卫\nvi. 设要塞
example: The old fort protected the harbour for more than three hundred years.
exampleCn: 这座古老堡垒保护了港口三百多年。

meaning: n. 水壶, 监牢, 模仿夜莺的叫声\nvt. 放入壶中, 炖, 关押\nvi. 模仿夜莺叫
example: Jug the rabbit.
exampleCn: 壶兔子。

meaning: a. 激发感情的, 挑拨的, 刺激的\nn. 刺激物, 挑拨物, 兴奋剂
example: A provocative remark.
exampleCn: 一句挑衅的话。

meaning: n. 归纳法, 感应, 就职, 入门\n[计] 归纳法
example: He was ordered to report for induction into the army.
exampleCn: 他奉命去报到入伍。

meaning: n. 果园, 果树林
example: They spent a warm autumn afternoon picking apples in the orchard and returned home with three full baskets.
exampleCn: 他们在一个温暖的秋日在果园里摘苹果带着满满的三个篮子回家计划做派和奶酥。

meaning: n. 铲, 铁铲\nv. 铲
example: Shovel sand.
exampleCn: 铲沙。

meaning: a. 复杂的, 错综的, 缠结的, 难懂的
example: Intricate lacework.
exampleCn: 复杂的花边。

meaning: n. 革新, 刷新, 修理\n[化] 改建
example: They are pursuing a general program of renovation to the entire property.
exampleCn: 他们正在对整个房产进行总体翻新计划。

meaning: a. 累积的\n[医] 蓄积的, 累积的
example: The benefits are cumulative.
exampleCn: 好处是累积的。

meaning: n. 窃贼\n[法] 夜盗, 窃贼, 盗窃者
example: The burglar broke in through the back window but was caught red-handed by the police.
exampleCn: 窃贼从后窗闯入但被马路对面邻居已报警的警察当场抓获。

meaning: a. 潜伏性的, 隐藏的\nn. 隐约指纹
example: A latent fingerprint.
exampleCn: 潜指纹。

meaning: n. 否决权\nvt. 否决, 禁止
example: The president exercised his veto to block the bill and sent it back to parliament with a list.
exampleCn: 总统行使了他的否决权阻止了这项法案并将其连同对提议修改的详细反对清单送回议会。

meaning: a. 数字的, 数值的, 以数字表示的, 擅长于计数的\n[经] 数字的, 用数字表示的
example: Numerical value.
exampleCn: 数值。

meaning: n. 圣经, 圣经的一节, 圣经的一句, 铭文
example: She read a passage from scripture at the wedding and her voice was steady and clear as she.
exampleCn: 她在婚礼上朗读了圣经中的一段话她念出关于爱与奉献的古老词句时声音平稳清晰。

meaning: vi. 用正餐, 进餐\nvt. 宴请
example: We often dine with friends in this restaurant.
exampleCn: 我们经常和朋友在这家餐厅用餐。

meaning: vt. 派遣\nn. 派遣, 急件\n[计] 调度
example: It was done with dispatch.
exampleCn: 这是通过派遣完成的。

meaning: n. 倾斜度, 梯度, 坡度, 斜率\na. 渐升的, 渐降的, 步行的
example: A five-degree gradient.
exampleCn: 五度梯度。

meaning: n. 口红, 唇膏\n[机] 口红
example: She checked her reflection in the mirror and applied a fresh coat of bright red lipstick before heading.
exampleCn: 她对着镜子检查了自己的妆容涂了一层鲜艳的红色口红然后出门去镇上见朋友。

meaning: vt. 点燃, 使灼热, 使兴奋
example: Great heat can ignite almost any dry matter.
exampleCn: 巨大的热量几乎可以点燃任何干燥物质。

meaning: vt. 挥舞, 运用
example: Wield power and authority.
exampleCn: 行使权力和权威。

meaning: a. 及时的, 适时的\nadv. 及时地
example: The timely filing of his income tax return.
exampleCn: 及时提交了他的所得税申报表。

meaning: n. 厄运, 不幸, 法律, 宣告, 判决, 死亡\nvt. 命中注定, 判决
example: Everyone was aware of the approaching doom but was helpless to avoid it.
exampleCn: 每个人都意识到厄运即将来临，却又无力避免。

meaning: n. 固执, 坚持不懈, 持续(性), 存留(状态)\n[电] 持久
example: Through sheer persistence she finally mastered the piece on the piano that she had been struggling.
exampleCn: 通过纯粹的坚持她终于掌握了她花了近六个月每天练习一直苦苦挣扎的那首钢琴曲。

meaning: vt. 减轻, 使缓和
example: The doctor gave her some medicine to alleviate the pain in her back and told her to rest.
exampleCn: 医生给了她一些药以减轻背部疼痛并告诉她要休息至少整整两个星期才能回去工作。

meaning:
n. 用力擦洗, 矮树, 矮人, 渺小之物
vt. 用力擦洗, 擦掉, 摩擦
vi. 擦洗干净, 进行手臂消毒
a. 次等的, 矮小的, 非正规球队的, 临时凑合的
example: Surgeons must scrub prior to an operation.
exampleCn: 外科医生在手术前必须进行擦洗。

meaning: a. 顽固的, 不听话的, 执拗的, 棘手的
example: A stubborn infection.
exampleCn: 顽固的感染。

meaning: n. 试验\na. 试验性的, 暂时的
example: Just a tentative schedule.
exampleCn: 只是一个暂定的时间表。

meaning: vt. 转开, 避免, 防止
example: Avert a strike.
exampleCn: 避免罢工。

meaning: n. 新奇, 新鲜, 新奇的事物
example: The novelty of living in a big city soon wore off and she found herself missing the quiet.
exampleCn: 住在大城市的新鲜感很快就消退了她们发现自己想念海边小镇的宁静简单。

meaning: a. 海边的, 海滨的\nn. 海滨
example: They spent a glorious day at the seaside building sandcastles and eating ice cream in the warm sunshine.
exampleCn: 他们在海边度过了愉快的一天在温暖的阳光下建造沙堡吃着冰淇淋旁边是轻轻拍打的波浪。

meaning: vt. 弄短, 缩短, 减少\nvi. 缩小, 变短
example: Shorten the skirt.
exampleCn: 缩短裙子。

meaning: n. 威胁, 胁迫\nv. 威吓, 胁迫
example: He spoke with desperate menace.
exampleCn: 他说话时带着绝望的威胁。

meaning: n. 征服, 统治权, 优势, 精通, 掌握\n[法] 统治权, 控制权, 征服
example: Mastery of the seas.
exampleCn: 掌控海洋。

meaning: a. 自大的, 傲慢的
example: An arrogant official.
exampleCn: 一个傲慢的官员。

meaning: n. 精力, 活力, 力量, 效力, 气势
example: He approached every task with great vigour and enthusiasm and his energy was infectious to everyone.
exampleCn: 他以极大的精力和热情投入到每项任务中他的活力感染了每一个有幸与他共事的人。

meaning: n. 旁路\nvt. 省略, 绕过, 忽视, 回避
example: You cannot bypass these rules!
exampleCn: 你不能绕过这些规则！

meaning: n. 说服, 信念, 派别, 说服力
example: I am not of your persuasion.
exampleCn: 我不同意你的劝说。

meaning: n. 慷慨, 宽大
example: Her generosity touched the lives of countless people in the village and when she passed away.
exampleCn: 她的慷慨感动了村里无数人的生活当她去世时整个社区都走到一起哀悼她的离世。

meaning: v. 小心, 谨防
example: Beware of telephone salesmen.
exampleCn: 谨防电话推销员。

meaning: vi. 跋涉\nvt. 涉水\nn. 跋涉, 浅滩
example: Can we wade across the river to the other side?
exampleCn: 我们可以涉水过河到对岸吗？

meaning: n. 家禽
example: They keep a flock of free-range poultry on the farm and sell the fresh eggs at the local.
exampleCn: 他们在农场养了一群散养家禽每周六早上雷打不动地在本地市场卖新鲜鸡蛋。

meaning: n. 火星, 战神\n[医] 铁
example: Mars has two satellites.
exampleCn: 火星有两颗卫星。

meaning: n. 发工资, 分赃, 贿赂, 盈利, 报酬, 报应, 结果, 高潮, 决定因素\na. 决定性的, 产生结果的, 支付的
example: Years of hard work finally brought a huge payoff when her first novel became an international bestseller translated.
exampleCn: 多年的努力终于带来了巨大的回报她的第一本小说成为了被翻译成三十多种语言的国际畅销书。

meaning: n. 衬里, 内层, 衬垫\n[化] 衬里; 衬垫; 衬套; 衬层
example: The coat had a soft silk lining that felt wonderfully smooth against her skin and kept her warm.
exampleCn: 这件大衣有柔软的丝绸衬里贴着她的皮肤感觉无比光滑即使在城市最冷的冬日也能保暖。

meaning: n. 耻辱, 丢脸, 谦卑
example: He had to undergo one humiliation after another.
exampleCn: 他不得不经历一次又一次的羞辱。

meaning: n. 服从, 顺从, 忠实\n[法] 服从, 顺从, 遵从
example: Their children were never very strong on obedience.
exampleCn: 他们的孩子从来都不太服从。

meaning: adv. 向岸, 在岸上
example: We invited them ashore.
exampleCn: 我们邀请他们上岸。

meaning: a. 周期的, 定期的, 间歇(性)的, 循环的, 用完整句的, 高碘的\n[医] 周期性的
example: The periodic appearance of the seventeen-year locust.
exampleCn: 十七年蝗虫的周期性出现。

meaning:
n. 排水沟, 槽, 贫民区
vt. 开沟于
vi. 流
[计] 装订线
example: His career was in the gutter.
exampleCn: 他的事业陷入了谷底。

meaning: a. 逐字的, 字面上的, 文字的, 字母的\nn. 印刷错误\n[计] 文字; 直接量; 字面量; 句节
example: A literal solitude like a desert.
exampleCn: 真正的孤独就像沙漠一样。

meaning: n. 网孔, 网丝, 网眼, 网状物, 圈套, 陷阱, 啮合\nvt. 以网捕捉, 啮合, 使缠住\nvi. 落网, 相啮合
example: A 100 mesh screen.
exampleCn: 100目筛网。

meaning: adv. 无限地, 无数地, 庞大地
example: He is infinitely wealthy.
exampleCn: 他是无限富有的。

meaning: n. 鸽子\ndive的过去式
example: A white dove flew over the square and landed on the fountain as the peace agreement was signed.
exampleCn: 一只白鸽飞过广场落在喷泉上与此同时两位领导人在附近的大楼里签署了和平协议。

meaning: a. 未付款的, 不支薪水的\n[经] 未付的, 未缴纳的
example: Unpaid wages.
exampleCn: 未付工资。

meaning: n. 沮丧\nvt. 使惊愕, 使气馁
example: To her great dismay she discovered that she had left her passport at home just as the taxi.
exampleCn: 令她极为沮丧的是当出租车停在机场航站楼外时她发现把护照忘在家里了。

meaning: n. 忍耐, 忍耐力, 耐性\n[机] 持九性
example: The marathon tests a runner's endurance.
exampleCn: 马拉松考验的是跑步者的耐力。

meaning: n. 绕, 卷, 弯曲, 线圈\na. 蜿蜒的, 卷绕的, 弯曲的
example: Winding roads are full of surprises.
exampleCn: 蜿蜒的道路充满惊喜。

meaning: n. 降格, 堕落, 退化\n[计] 降级
example: The degradation of the forest over the past century has led to the extinction of dozens of species.
exampleCn: 一个世纪以来森林的退化导致了数十个曾经以它为家的物种的灭绝。

meaning: n. 手册\n[计] 手册
example: The employee handbook clearly states that all workers are entitled to at least four weeks of paid holiday.
exampleCn: 员工手册明确规定所有工人每年有权享有至少四周带薪假期毫无例外。

meaning: a. 脆弱的, 虚弱的, 意志薄弱的\nn. 少女, 少妇, 灯心草篓
example: An invalid's frail body.
exampleCn: 病人身体虚弱。

meaning: vt. 激怒, 使发怒, 使兴奋, 使发炎\nvi. 引起不快
example: Irritate the glands of a leaf.
exampleCn: 刺激叶子的腺体。

meaning: a. 不相容的, 不能并存的, 矛盾的\n[化] 不协调
example: Incompatible personalities.
exampleCn: 性格不相容。

meaning: n. 全部剧目, 全部技能, 全部节目, 全部作品
example: The pianist has a vast repertoire and can play over two hundred pieces from memory without ever needing.
exampleCn: 这位钢琴家拥有广阔的曲目库可以凭记忆演奏两百多首曲子而不需要看一页乐谱。

meaning: n. 城堡, 要塞\nvt. 筑要塞, 以要塞防守
example: The fortress was built on an island just off the coast and for centuries it guarded the entrance.
exampleCn: 这座堡垒建在离海岸不远的一个小岛上几个世纪以来一直守卫着下方繁忙海港的入口不受侵略者侵犯。

meaning: a. 可怜的, 不幸的, 卑鄙的
example: Spent a wretched night on the floor.
exampleCn: 在地板上度过了一个悲惨的夜晚。

meaning: n. 铀\n[化] 铀U
example: Uranium is the primary fuel used in nuclear power plants and must be mined and processed.
exampleCn: 铀是核电站使用的主要燃料必须极其小心精准地开采和加工以确保安全。

meaning: n. 穿透, 渗透, 侵入, 识穿, 洞察(力)\n[化] 渗入
example: The penetration of upper management by women.
exampleCn: 高层管理人员中女性的渗透。

meaning: n. 临时解雇, 操作停止, 活动停止期间
example: The sudden layoff of over five hundred workers shocked the small town and the community rallied together.
exampleCn: 突然解雇五百多名工人震惊了小镇社区团结在一起帮助那些失业的人。

meaning: n. 突起, 突出, 显著, 突出物, 凸出\n[医] 隆凸, 凸
example: He stood on the rocky prominence.
exampleCn: 他站在岩石突出的地方。

meaning: vt. 集合, 召集, 召唤\nvi. 聚集, 集合
example: The board decided to convene an emergency meeting to discuss the sudden drop in sales and decide.
exampleCn: 董事会决定召集紧急会议讨论销售的骤然下降并决定公司的明确行动方针。

meaning: n. 气质, 性格, 性情\n[医] 气质, 禀赋
example: She has a calm and even temperament that makes her perfectly suited for the stressful and demanding job.
exampleCn: 她性情冷静平和这使她非常适合空中交通管制员那份压力大要求高的工作。

meaning: n. 大麦\n[医] 大麦
example: The farmer planted a field of barley in early spring and by late summer the golden stalks.
exampleCn: 农民早春种下一块大麦田到夏末金黄的麦秆在温暖的晚风中轻轻摇曳。

meaning: n. 胡桃\n[机] 胡桃木
example: He cracked open a walnut with a loud snap and dropped the crumbled shell into the bowl.
exampleCn: 他啪的一声敲开了一颗核桃把碎壳丢进桌边窗旁的碗里。

meaning: adv. 宇宙, 全世界, 普遍, 一般, 普通, 全体, 一致, 通用, 万能, 广用, 广泛
example: People universally agree on this.
exampleCn: 人们普遍同意这一点。

meaning:
n. 蹲, 窝
a. 蹲着的, 矮胖的
vi. 蹲下, 蹲坐, 蹲伏
vt. 使蹲下, 擅自占有
example: A little church with a squat tower.
exampleCn: 一座小教堂，有一座矮塔。

meaning: n. 抽出, 取出, 拔出术, 抽出物\n[化] 萃取; 提取
example: The dentist gave her a local anesthetic prior to the extraction.
exampleCn: 牙医在拔牙前给她进行了局部麻醉。

meaning: n. 最适条件, 最佳效果\na. 最优的, 最适宜的
example: An optimum return on capital.
exampleCn: 最佳资本回报率。

meaning: n. 队列, 结盟, 校正\n[计] 校准; 对齐; 对准
example: The mechanic checked the alignment of the wheels and made a few small adjustments before sending the car.
exampleCn: 机械师检查了车轮的定位做了一些小的调整才把车送回路上试驾。

meaning: n. 栗子, 栗树, 栗色\na. 栗色的
example: A chestnut horse.
exampleCn: 一匹栗色的马。

meaning: n. 眨眼, 使眼色, 瞬间\nvi. 眨眼, 使眼色, 闪烁\nvt. 眨
example: He gave her a quick wink across the crowded room and she knew immediately that everything was going.
exampleCn: 他在拥挤的房间里向她快速使了个眼色她立刻知道从那一刻起一切都会好起来的。

meaning: a. 迂回的, 委婉的\nn. 迂回路线
example: A roundabout paragraph.
exampleCn: 一个迂回的段落。

meaning: n. 惊异, 惊愕, 使人惊异的事物
example: He looked at me in astonishment.
exampleCn: 他惊讶地看着我。

meaning: n. 年代记, 记录, 编年史\nvt. 把...载入编年史
example: The book chronicles the remarkable life of a woman who travelled alone across the deserts of Africa.
exampleCn: 书中记载了一位在二十世纪初独自穿越非洲沙漠的女性的非凡一生。

meaning: n. 脂肪, 兽脂, 油脂, 贿赂\nvt. 涂脂于, 贿赂
example: Grease the wheels.
exampleCn: 润滑轮子。

meaning: n. 裁剪者, 切割者, 切割器\n[化] 刀具; 剪切机; 切刀; 切胶机
example: He used a sharp cutter to slice through the thick cardboard and then carefully folded the pieces.
exampleCn: 他用一把锋利的切割刀切开厚纸板然后小心地把碎纸板折好整齐堆放以备回收。

meaning: vt. 扣除, 减去\n[经] 扣除, 减去, 折扣
example: The company will deduct a small amount from your salary each month to cover the cost.
exampleCn: 公司每月会从你的工资中扣除一小笔钱用于支付你已签约加入的健康保险计划。
